script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Miz ngoenz ndeu, Nungz Cigauh cingq youq henz daemz naj Gvangjyenz couhfuj nyingz naq,lienzlienz nyingz,lienzlienz con gvaq conghmbok.."Caen lek!"Fwt miz vunz hemq ndei.Nungz Cigauh baez yawj,daxdoeng mumhhau raezrangh he coh de riunyumj. Nungz Cigauh yiengq daxgoeng yaengx fwngz naeuz:"Cingj bouxlaux son'gyauq!" Daxgoeng daj ndaw genbuh gvangqlangh de dawz ok gaiq baengzdoj he,venj hwnj gwnz goliux,naeuz:"Danghnaeuz naq mwngz ndaej nyingz mbongq gaiq baengz neix,couh suenq goengfou daengzgya lo." Nungz Cigauh naemj,gou nyingz ndaej mbongq mbokfaex,lij nyingz mbouj mbongq gaiq baengz he?De beng gung dap naq,naq he nyingz gvaqbae,baek mbouj haeuj baengz,dauq hawj baengz danz doxdauq. De lienzlienz nyingz sam naq,naqnaq

text: 1. Raemxmboq .. 74 2. Guekcoj raeuz hungmbwk .. 76 3. Baekging .. 80 4. "Caetit" .. 83 5. "Vujyiz" gozci lauzdungcez .. 85 6. Duzmaxloeg huk .. 87 7. Duzguk caeuq duzgoep .. 90 8. Baenzlawz ndaem manghgoj .. 95 9. Seizcin .. 99 10. Ying'yungvwnz .. 104

text: Buxlawq dwk haz hod Buxlawq hod haz heu Boq mbawzjiu siq saek Boq mbawznaek siq sinz Byock ndeuz ninz sau runq Liengh box yuq gvaq hwnz Liengh box ndun gvaq haemh Doijmizcih zok goz Doijmizndacj zuangz bix

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: coh haij maeuz ak Dahyinh Bingzluz dieg bienhleih hawciengz gaicawx dieg canjnieb henz bien gaenh gangj yiengh swnghcanjliz rengzmoq dox baedauq dox gyaulouz dox yungzhab cungj swhveiz boux baenz boux baih ranzmbanj cingsaenz caezcaemh Cunghvaz Minzcuz ranzmbanj vuenyungz doengzcaez fouqmiz ranzmbanj huzndei henmuengh doxbang ranzmbanj gyaeundei ndeiyouq ndaejgyaeu ranzmbanj henzguek bingzan onjdingh gij huqliuh haeuj guek baujsuiq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: yamqdin cienj haeuj loegsaek danqnoix gyavaiq, gij caetliengh swnghdai vanzging laebdaeb gaijndei

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gij bonjsaeh bauj guekgya ancienz caiq lai gyaak, gaiq hong ceihleix ndawbiengz ndaej engq mizrengz, aen daihbuenz ndawbiengz baujciz onjdingh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gozfangz caeuq bingdoih guh ndei baenaj lailai

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: hengzguh "aen guekgya ndeu song cungj cidu" ndaej doi haeuj laeg bae

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: yiengh vaigyauh guekhung miz gij daegsaek Cungguek cienzmienh haigvangq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: cienzmienh yiemzhaenq guenj Dangj cingzyauq yienhda, fanj nduknaeuh doucwngh doi haeuj ndaw laeg, gij rengzcauhguh 、rengzgietcomz 、rengzdwkhoenx aen Dangj daezsang yienhda. Gij saedlig ginghci 、saedlig gohgi 、gueklig gyoebhab guek raeuz yat hwnj mbaek moq, gij yendaiva yiengh Cungguek byaij ok yamqdin maenhsaed moq, diuz roen moq buekguh gij moegbiu aen bak bi daihngeih guhbaenz haibuenz ndei. Aeundaej doengh gij cingzcik hungloet neix, goekgaen dwg aenvih miz aen Dangjcunghyangh aeu Siz Ginbingz dungzci guh goek haenx gaemdox dazroen, dwg aenvih miz Aen Swhsiengj Sevei Cujyi Miz Gij Daegsaek Cungguek Seizdaih Moq Siz Ginbingz gohyoz dazyinx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cawjguenj: Gvangjsih Bouxcuengh Swcigih Minzcuz Cunghgyau Swvu Veijyenzvei Cawjbanh: Gvangjsih Minzcuz Bause Geiz neix 8 banj Aenhauh okbanj: CN45-0036 B.2025 Nd.11 Ng.19 Liggaeuq ietceih nienz ndwengouj samcib Geizsoq: Gungh daih 3694 geiz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gvangjsih Netsaed Doihaeuj Hwnqguh Gih Guhyiengh Couqmaenh Gij Eiqsik Cunghvaz Minzcuz Ranz Vunz Ndeu

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 11 nyied 13 hauh, gicej daj aen hoih fatbouh saehmoq haenzroix cawjdaez "guhsat hwngfat ndei saed aen gvivieh 'cibseiq haj" Sweigih Cwngfuj Sinhvwnzban guh de roxyiuj. Gih raeuz aeu couqmaenh gij eiqsik Cunghvaz Minzeuz ranz vunz ndeu dangguh diuz sienqmeh gak hangh hong daengx gih, caezhwnq caezyungh "haj aen suenranz", doinyoengx hwnqguh couqmaenh gij eiqsik Cunghvaz Minzeuz ranz vunz ndeu byaij larg hyaij saed.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caechwnq caezyungh aen suenranz cingsaenz caezcaemh Cunghvaz Minzeuz, gak cuz vunzlai engqgya dawzdingh "haj aen nyinhdoengz". Gvangjsih cauhlaeb daengx aen senheonz gyauyuz couqmaenh gij eiqsik Cunghvaz Minzeuz ranz vunz ndeu faen gaep faen loih, ewgoemq liuxliux, gungganq 10 aen dieggiek yenzgiu "couqmaenh", youq 《Gvangjsih Yizbua》hai cienbanj "couqmaenh gij eiqsik Cunghvaz Minzcuz ranz vunz ndeu "daengx guck dangjbau aen

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: nudj, gangj ndei gij gojgaeq Gvangjsih minzcuz doxgiet haenaj. Cienzswnj hwngfat gij vunzva ciuhgeq maenhndei Cunghvaz, dajcauh "sam nyied sam Gvangjsih·aen ciet angq Betgveiq" doenghgij binjhaiz miz daegsaek neix.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caechwnq caezyungh aen suenranz vuenyungz doengzcaez haenzmiz, gak cuz vunzlai caez byaij coh sevei cujyi yendaiva baihnaj engqgya ronghsag. Aeu "yinzgungh cinwngz" hawjrengz cien hangz bak nich, aeu AI yungh daengz aen hidungi hingzgya hwnqguh gih guhyicngh doenghgi dieg guhhong minzeuz neix. Bued ngaeziencz caizewng swnjciep doihaeuj guhhoengh lajmbanj gij hong hwngfat minzeuz vunznoix 35.8 ik maenz, guh 5800 lai aen hangmoeg, dieg duetgungz lajmbanj boux vunz ndaej cehoiq souhaeuj lienzdaemh 4 hi sang gvaq daengx guek, daengx gih lajmbanj boux vunz hingzyaenx sujhingz. 8 aen yienh si, gih henzguek guhbaenz roen gauhsuz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: "yienhyienh doeng", Bwzszw Si, Bingzsiengz Si senjhaeuj aen hawsingz sawqdiemj doengzcaez yendaiva daengx guek.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caezhwnq caezyungh aen suenranz huzndei henmuengh doxbang, gak minzeuz doxyvaj doxyvau doxyungz lai gvangq lai laeg. Laebdaeb doihaeuj "sam hangh dajveh·Gvangjsih cingq hengzdoengh", Gvangjish caeq Gangi Au Daiz caeuq guekgya Dunghmungz doxgyau doxgap laebdaeb gvauk. Gihwngz segih hong minzcuz cauhmoq hwngfat, segih hwnqguh, segih fugsaeh caeuq segih hozdung suijhingz laebdaeb daezswng. Cauhlaeb minzeuz doxget haenaj aeundaej cunghyoengq moq. daengx gih seizneiz miz gih guhyiengh minzcuz doxgiet baenaj daengx guek danhvei guhyiengh 61 aen, mozfan cizdij 310 aen, mozfan houxvunz 314 boux.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caezhwnq caezyungh aen suenranz gyaeundei ndeiyouq ndaejgyaeu, aen ciubaiz "Gvangjsih

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: swnghdai gijndei gim mbouj vuenh" engqgya rongh. Laebmaenh caeuq hengzguh aen leixniemh song hya, swnghdai vanzging cizieng laebdaeb lai hi baujyouq daengx guek baihnaj. Cienzmienh doihengz aen vunqsik guenjleix lajmbanj "dangjgen + vangjgwz + daihsoqgawq", hwnqguh lajmbanj gyaeundei habyouq habnieb guh baenaj ndeindi. lajmbanj seiqhenz vunz youq laebdaeb gaijndei, gak cuz vunzlai lai raen ndaejdaengz, raen vuenyungz, raen ancienz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caechwnq caezyungh aen suenranz henzguek hingzan onjdingh, daengx aen guenjleix hongsaeh minzeuz caeuq rengz guenjleix engqgya ndei saed liuxliux. Guhyiengh doekguh aen cidu gizdieg minzeuz gagguenj, siujsim onjdingh doihaeuj hong diuzcingj guheaez minzeuz cwnqewz fapgvi. Laebdaeh gek fuengz gij fungyiemj huxndumj aen gvaengx minzeuz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daj «Gvangjsih Yizbau» aeu daeuj genj hoiz Hoz Mingzvaz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gvangjsih Bouh Nduj Heiq-yungh Heiqlwgnyez Youq Nanzningz Yienj Baez Nduj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 11 nyied 14 hauh daengz 15 hauh. Gvangjsih bouh nduj Heiqyungh heiqlwgnyez 《Roegvameiz Ndaengndiengq》 youq Yungheouh Gicangz yienj, bouh heiq neix dwg Nanzningz Si Minzeuz Vwnzva Yisuz Yenzgiuyen caeuq Gvangjsih Yisuz Hagdangz caez cauhbaiz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 《Roegvameiz Ndaengndiengq》aeu gojlwgnyez gojbeij guh lamzbonj, lwnhgangj gij gojgeq roegvameiz majhung

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Roegvameiz gyaeundei baengh sing go ndedingq ciengqgo ndaej daih' it le, ndaengndiengq ndaengmoj, bienqhaenz duzroeg gikgyakgyak, mbouj lienq ciengq, mbouj guh rongz, gaenx gwn gik guh. Mwh seizdoeng daeuj daengz, roegvameiz deng rumznit cifofo ienqhoij raixeix. Doeklaeng, de ndaej daengz gyoengq roeg bang dauq bienq gaenz, dauqcungz ra dauq honjfaenh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Baezneix 《Roegvameiz Ndaengndiengq》 camgva aen haijyienj heiq vunzmoq cozhinj moq daengx guek gaiq nduj, mboujdan dwg Gwangjsih houh nduj Heiqyungh heiqlwgnyez baez nduj oknaj, lij hai dizuoen moq hawj cienzwnj cienzboq heiq yaek mied. Doenggvaq heiq ciuhgeq caeuq daezcaiz lwgnyez cauhmoq yungzhab, bouh heiq neix guwq haujlouz miz gijndei yisuz Heiqyungh, youh hawj de miz rengz singjsien depgyawj seizdaih depgyawj lwgnyez, ok rengz vwnzva Gvangjsih hawj aen haijyienj heiq vunzmoq cozhinj moq daengx guek. Lij Cunghvwnz Vangz Fanghhih

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 11 nyied 14 hauh, youq Mungzsanh Yen Sinhhih Cin Gujding Cunh aen dieg ndaem cazyouz ndeu, vunzlai cingq mbaet makcazyouz. Geij bi neix daeuj, aen yienh neix guh buek dieg ndaem cazyouz ndeu, ragdoengh vunzlai henzgyawj ndaem cazyouz roxnaeuz gaijcauh ndoeng cazyouz, hawj de lai baenz mak ndaej ngaenz, hangrengz guhhoengh lajmhanj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij Genyi Gvendaengz Ceiqdingh Aen Gveihva Haj Bi Daih Cibhaj Gozminz Ginghci Caeuq Sevei Fazcanj Cunghgung Cunghyangh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: —Sevei vwnzmingz mingzyienj daezswng. Gagsaeng vwnzva bonjfaenh engqgya dawzdingh, gij haklinx swhsiengj gaemgoek yied daeuj yied ndaej gyamaenh bienq hung, aen hwsinh gyacizgvanh sevei cujyi gvangqlangh hengzguh, daengx aen minzeuz ak cauhmog ak cauhguh vwnzva ngoenz hoengh gvaq ngoenz, gij saedeeij vwnzva cingsaenz yinzminz engqgya lai yiengh, gij sim gij rengz Cunghvaz Minzeuz engqgya gietcomz, gij vwnzva Cunghvaz yingjyangj seiqgyaiq engq hung, gij saedlig' unq guekgya lienzdaemh daezsang.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ——Saedceij yinzminz yied gvaq yied ndei. Yiengh cukgaeuq youh onjmaenh dwk couhnieb caiq raen lai ndei, gihminz souhaeuj demmaj caeuq ginghci demmaj doengzhouh, cienzhong daezsang caeuq lauzdung swngheanjliz daezsang doengzhouh, aen gapgyaq faenboiq ndaej gaijndei, gyoengqvunz souhaeuj cungdaengj lienzdaemh gyalai, aen cidu sevei baujcang engqgya bienq ndei youh ndaej lienzdaemh, yiengh fugsaeh vunzlai caezcaemh ceiq noix bouxhoux doxdoengz daezsang yienhda.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ——Hwnqguh aen Cungguek gyaeundei byaij ok yamq hung. Loegsaek swnghcanj loegsaek swnghhoz daihdaej cauxhaenz, aen moegbiu danqdaemxdingi ciuggeiz guhhaenz, aen dijhi nwnqzyenz yienghmog cinghseuq danqnoix ancienz yauqlwd sang haenx cobouh laebhaenz, gij cungjsoq baizeuengq gaiq huq uqlah youqgaenj laebdaeb gemjnoix, swnghdai hidungj yied daeuj yied lai yiengh, onjdingh, lienzdaemh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ——Gaiqdangj hawj guekgya ancienz engqgya maenhdwt. Aen dijhi caeuq gij bonjsaeh hawj guekgya ancienz youh caiq gyaak, gij fungyiemj aen lingjyiz youqgaenj ndaej daengz mizyauq fuengzre vaqgej, guenj hiengz caeuq guenj gij ancienz vunzlai caezcaemh guh ndaej engq ndei, aen moeghiu buekguh laehbaenz bingdoih it bak hi ciuqseiz guhbaenz, hwnqguh aen Cungguek hingzan rem' ak ndaej onjmaenh doi haenaj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq gwnz giekdaej neix caiq haenqrengz buekguh haj bi, daengz 2035 nienz guh daengz gij saedlig ginghci, saedlig gohgi, saedlig gozfangz, gueklig gyoebhab caeuq gij rengzlig yingyangi gozci guek raeuz bonghyat hwnj sang, swngheanj cungjcz ndaw guek dan bingz daengz gak boux dabdaengz gij sujbingz aen guekgya fatdad cungdaengj, ndwenngoenz yinzminz engqgya vuenyungz gyaeundei, daihdaej guhbaenz sevei cujyi yendaiva.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Sam, Hwnqguh Aen Dijhi Canjnieb Yendaiva, Guhmaenh Guhhung Aen Goekgaen Yiengh Ginghci Saeddaej

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen dijhi canjnieh yendaiva dwg aen giek vuzeiz gisuz dwkdaej guh gij yendaiva yiengh Cungguek. Dawzmaenh guh ginghei aeu coq rengz guh yiengh ginghei saeddaej, dawzmaenh aen fuengyiengq haenz cinwngz, haenz loegsaek, dox yungzhab, gyavaiq hwnqguh aen guekak dajcauh, aen guekak caetliengh, aen guekak hangzdenh, aen guekak gyaudoeng, aen guekak vangjloz, bauj hawj hangz cauhguh beijfaenh hableix, cauhlaeh aen dijhi canjnieh yendaiva aeu hangz cauhguh maenhndei guhdaeuz haenx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 7 Gaijndei swngsang doengh aen canjnieh conzdungj. Doinyoengx gij canjnieh youqgaenj gaijndei swnggaep, gyamaenh gyaak doengh gij canjnieh gvangyez, yejginh, vagungh, ginghgungh, daemjrok, gihgai, aenruz, dajhwng haenx, hawj de youq ndaw canjnieh faengoeng daengx seiqgyaiq engq ak bae ceng hingz. Engq ak gag dawz gag gaem diuzlienh canjnieh, gyaak caiq cauh yiengh giekdaej canjnieh caeuq gung roengz gij gisuz canghbei hungnaek, lienzdaemh hengzguh gaiq hong hawj diuzlienh canjnieh youqgaenj hangz cauhguh ciuq yiengh ndei ak bae guh, lai hawj hangz cauhguh maenhndei comzgyoengq. Doinyoengx gisuz gaijeauh swnggaep, coihaejj hangz cauhguh cienjh haenz yiengh soqcih yiengh cinwngz, hwngfat cinwngz cauhguh, loegsaek cauhguh, yiengh fugsaeh cauhguh, gyaaiq gajbienq canjnieh vunqsik caeuq giyez cujeiz hingzdai. Gyaak gij naengzlig yiengh gisuz giekdaej caetliengh, gyaengz aeu biucinj yinxlingx, engq habngamj gozei, gyarengz dajcauh hinjhaiz. Gaijndei canjyez baijbouh, coihawj gij canjnieh youqgaenj youq ndaw guek miz bohloh senjdieg.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 8 Ganq ok guh hung gij canjnieb ngamq hwng caeuq yiengh canjnieb daengzcog. Roengzrengz dajcauh aen canjnieb donghsaeu ngamq hwng. Hengzguh aen gunghcwngz canjnieb cauhmoq, doxcaez doihaeuj gaiq hong hwnqguh sezsih cauhoqng, yenzgui haifat gisuz, vuenh daih swnggaep canjbinj, gyavaiq nwnqzyenz moq, caizliuh moq, hangzgungh hangzdenh, yiengh ginghci mhwn daemq daengji gij canjnieb ngamq hwng nangq daengxbuenz de comzgyoengq hwnfgt. Caezcienz gij swnghdai canjnieb, saedhengz gaiq hong guhyiengh daihuek bae yungh gisuz moq canjhinj moq ciengzgingj moq, gyavaiq haenz gveihmoq hwnfgt gij canjnieb ngamq hwng.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yawj gyae hae haijbouh aen canjnieh daengzcog, damqra gij gisuz lohsienq lai yiengh, giz ciengzingj wngqyungh denjhingz, gij vunqisk sanghye guh ndaej, gij gveihewz gamguenj hawciengz, doinyengx liengswj gohgi, swnghvuz ceiqcauh, ginghnwngz caeuq nwgzyenz hwzciben, gaiq ciep uk, gaiq raeh lumj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: vunz, yizdung dunghsin daih daihroek daengj bienqbaenz giz ginghci demmaj moq. Cauhmoq gij fuengsik gamguenj, hwnfgat yiengh douzswh cauhnieh, laehhwnj aen gihci hawj gij canjnieh daengzcog douzhaeuj demlai caeuq faenrap fungyiemj. Coihaeuj giyez rauh iq coh cien cing daeg moq bae hwnfgat, gungganq gij giyez "nyaengauedog".

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 9 Coicaenh hangz fugsaeh ndei youh vaiq bae hwngfat. Hengzguh yiengsaeh coi hangz fugsaeh hwngyuengh bienq ndei, gyadaih hangz fugsaeh hailangh, gyalaeg gamguenj gaijgwz, laehndei cwngcz djihi bae haeujcoengh, rex hung gya lai gij cawjdaej ginghyingz maenhndei, faen lingyiz doihaeuj hangz fugsaeh swnghcanj bienq ciennieh caeuq iet haeuj giz gyaiz sang bae, coicaenh hangz fugsaeh gwndaenj binjcaet sang, haenz lai yiengh, bienq bienhleih bae hwngfat. Hawj hangz fugsaeh ciuhneix caeuq hangz cauhguh maenhndei, nungzyez ciuhneix yungzhab hwngfat engq ndei bae, doinyengx hangz fugsaeh bienq soqcih bienq cinwngz. Gyaengz laehndei gij biucinj fugsaeh caeuq dajcauh gij binjbaiz caetliengh ndei. Laebcaez aen dijhi gyoebsuenq gamcaek hangz fugsaeh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 10 Laebhwnj gij dijhi sezsih giekdaej hab ciuhneix. Lai yunghrengz naemj daengxbuenz bae gveihva yiehng sezsih giekdaej, gajndei gapgyaq baijbouh, oiceaenh gyebecomz yungzhah, hawj de engq ancienz naihniu caeuq engq lienzdaemh ndaej yungh. Habdangq mauhgonq bae hwnqguh gij seznih giekdaej yiehngmoq, doihaeuj hwnqguh caeuq gyonjconz engq ndei leihyungh saenqsik doengsaenq vangjloz, aen vangj suenqlig daengx guek doxcaemh, gij seznih giekdaej gohgi hungnaek daengj, doihaeuj gij seznih giekdaej mwhgonq vuenhmoq caeuq gaj baeanz soqehic einwngz. Laebhndei aen cunghah gyaudoeng daeyinh dijhi hab ciuhneix, lai guh hamj ranghdieg doengzcaemh haijbouh, lai fuengsik haenz aen cingjdaej dox hamzciep, roengzrengz hawj digh buegnyieg doeng roenci liux caiq bauj de doengrat. Laebcaez aen dijhi roenloh daeyinh gozei lai yiengh, naihniu haenx. Hawj gij roenloh goetganq daeyinh nwingzyenz baijbouh engq ndei, gyarengz hwnqguh gij seznih giekdaej nwingzyenz yiengmoq. Gyavaiq hwnqguh aen muengxraemx habngamj ciuhneix, gyaak gij bonjsaeh fuengzre dingjdangj raemxrongz raemxdumh, itcaez diuzboiq swhyenz raemx, bauj hawj singz mbanj miz raemx yungh. Doihaeuj hwnqguh gij seznih giekdaej caezcaemh hawsingz seiz gaeinj seiz soeng caeuz yungh de.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Seiq, Gyavaiq Yiengh Gohgi Suijbingz Sang Haenx Gag Guh Gag Ak, Lingxdaeuz Hwangfat Yiengh Swnghcanjliz Rengzmoq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij yendaiva yiengh Cungguek aeu baengh gohgi yendaiva daeuj daemxcengj. Cadawz aen lizsij seizgei lwnz gohgi gwzming caeuq canjnieh bengwz moq, doengbuenz maeuzveh hwnqguh aen guekak gyauyuz, aen guekak gohgi, aen guekak vunzcaiz, daezswng gij cingjdaej yauqnaengz aen dijhi cauhmoq guekgya, cienzmienh gyaak gij bonjsaeh gag cauhmoq, ciemqhah giz diegsang gohgi hwngfat, mboujduenh coiok yiengh swnghcanjliz rengzmoq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 11 Gyarengz guh codaeuz cauhmoq caeuq gung roengz gij gisuz ceiq youqgaenj. Laebndei gij yieghmog daengg guek ok rengz, yungg gujhaf mauhgaq hingzciengz, daengx lienhdiuz doinyoengx gunggvan eizewngz denlu, gunghyez mujgih, gauhdonh yizgi, gihcuj yonjgen, senhein caizliuh, swnghvuz eicqcauh daengj lingjyz cungdenj gij gisuz eiq youqgaenj aundaej yiengh cunghyoengq gietdngh haenzsaeh haenx. Lai negiex guekgya canloz aeyungh, baijbouh saedhengz buek gohgi yinvu hungnaek guekgya ndeu. Gyarengz ciuq canloz bae, yawj gyae bae, haenz dijhi bae haijhouh giekdaej yenzgiu, gyalai faenh douzhaeuj guh giekdaej yenzgiu, caiq ciengzgeiz onjdingh bae haeujcoengh. Gyarem dazyinx gohyoz yenzgiu, gisuz haifat guh codaeuz cauhmoq, gaijndei gij vanzingg ikleih guh cauhduj, guh yiengh cauhmoq boekbuenz, cauh ok gij cwingzgoj cauhnduj ndaej guh maihauh de engq lai.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 12 Doinyoengx gohgi cauhmoq caeuq canjnieb cauhmoq yungzhab haeuj laeg. Doenghuenz maaeuzeh dajcauh gij liglieng gohgi coengh canloz guekgya, gyaak gij honjsaeh guh haenzroix gunggyan. Gyarengz gag guhcawj bauj gij diuzgienh giekdaej gohgi, doenghuenz maaeuzeh hwnqguh gij hingzdaiz gihdi gohgi cauhmoq. Laehndei aen dijhi cauhmoq gvaengxdieg, haijhouh hwnqguh aen cungsim gohgi cauhmoq ndaw gvaengxdieg caeuq aen dieg yinxlingx canjnieb gohgi cauhmoq. gyaak gij goengnaengz gizgoek aen cungsim gohgi cauhmoq gozei. Gyavaiq hawj gij gohgi cwngzgoi hwngaek engq vaiq dwk cienjvaq haenz yungh, haijhouh hwnqguh aen hingzdaiz niemheingq gainen, niemheingq duenhgyang sawqniemh, gyarengz hwnqguh caeuq cuengqhai giz wngqyungh, gyarengz haujhoh caeuq yinhyungh cihsiz canjienz. Dajcauh yiengh swnghdai hailangh cauhmoq miz gij rengz ndaej caeuq seiggyaiq heijak haenx. Haeujcoengh gohgi gohgi vunzeaiz houcoz cauhmoq cauhnieh. Gyarengz bujgiz gohyoz gisuz, gungganq cauhmoq vwnzva, hwnqcienz gij cingsaenz gohyozgyah. Gyarengz laehndei gohgi fapceih, lunzlij, saenqyungh, ancienz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gunghvaz Minzcuz Gaemh Ranz Ndeu. Gaezsim San Aen Loqsiengj Raeuz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: YIVU GYAUYUZ GOCWNGZ BYAUHCUNJ SAWCUENGH SIZYEN GYAUGOHSUH

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij iq youq hagdangz doegsaw seiz, gou couh deng aen goj《Haj Boux Cangsw Byalangzyaz》 gamjdoengh dwk yaek gyanghwnz bae gizdieg haenx yawjyawj. Daxboh naeuz: "Hozhwz Swngj liz dieg raeuz cien leix fanh loh, baenzlawz bae, daengzcog mwngz majhung le caiq bae ba."

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou dingq vah daxboh, cijndaej cuengq aen goj neix youq ndawsim, gag naemj: Daengzcog baenzlawz hix aeu daengz gizhaenx bae yawj baez ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou doegsaw, guhhong, baenzranz, saedceij ngoenz dem ngoenz gvaqhae, aen siengjmuengh lij iq haenx cungj mbouj caengz ndaej saedyienh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenz ndeu, goengdaeuz doiq gou naeuz: "Yaek daengz ngoenzciet laebguek lo, raeuz aeu ndeindei senheonz gij saeh gaxgonq gyoengq hungzginh, gyoengq youzgizdui caeuq vunzdig doxhoenx haenx."

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ciepdwk, goengdaeuz dawz mbaw ceij ndeu ndenq hawj gou, gwnz ceij raiz miz geij aen goj, heuh gou gug senj aen goj ndeu, vaiqdangq bae caijfangj guh senhconz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Miz aen goj ndeu heuhguh《Byacaetsing》, gou yawj gij neiyungz aen goj neix le, miz di doeksaet, gag naemj: Dieg gou haenzlawz hix miz aen goj caeuq《Haj Boux Cangsw Byalangzyaz》ca mbouj geijlai ni?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Geizheih, doeksaet gyaep gou vaiqdangq bae yawj aen goj《Byacaetsing》, Gou doiq goengdaeuz naeuz: "Ngoenzcog gou couh bae Byacaetsing yawjyawj, caiq gaep geij mbaw siengq dem."

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzlaeng haetromh, dou seiq boux daj yienhsingz daeuj daengz Bingzgoj Si Bangjhih Cin Lozhih Cunh, boux daiq roen heuhguh Luz Divaz, vunz Lozhih Cunh Mbanjgyanghhungz, de daiq dou daengz laj dinhya ndeu, naeuz: "Goengq hya neix dou heuh Byamax, gaxgonq caet boux Hungzciziginh cansw couh youq gwnz dingjbya neix diuq roengz dat hae."

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Byamax youq baihsaebaek Bangjhih Cin, goengq hya neix gyaeuj iet coh baih-namzbaek, raezrwgrwg, song gyaeuj hya faenbied miz song ndaek bo hung doed hwnjdaeuj, baihdaemq baihsang, lumj aen anmax nei daengj coh gwnzmbwn. Gyoengqvunz dangdieg couh heuh goengq hya neix guh Byamax.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gwnz gyaeuj cungj hwnj nwnj, mizhoux gen ga deng gaeu gat, deng oen coeg oklwed.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Byamas daj haihamz yawj hae dwg caeuq gij hya wng doxrangh, dwg ranghhya raezredd ndeu, daengg haihaek baez yawj cij rox goengq hya neix dwg goengq hya dog ndeu. Gwnz hya faex lai ndoeng ndaet, gaeugeq doxsan doxheux, geij cih bi mhouj miz vunz hwnj hya daeuj, ra mbouj raen roen, dou dog gaem cax fwet roen doq coh gwnz hya benz bae, mizeiz bin dat gvaq rin, mizeiz ndonj gvaq laj faex, ndaw ndoeng duznon raih, duznengz mbin, dou mizhoug deng dzunyungz haeh daengz gwnz fwnz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aiq miz sam aen lai cung, dou cij daeuj daengz dingjbya Byamax,bouxboux hozhawq dwk conghhoz yaek dawz feiz, bage dwk diemjcaw yaek mbouj hwnj, buhvaq ndaek hanh, daengx ndang haeuget haeumanh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Luz Divaz naeuz, de dingq daxgoeng de naeuz, gaxgonq geij boux hungzginh cansw couh dwg daj gizneix diuq roengz dat bae lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dingjbya Byamax, cungj dwg rinroujgaeq, youh soem youh raeh, vunz ndwn youq gwnz Byamax, rumz gveujfefe, ngiengx da yawj bae, doiqnaj couhdwg Mhanjgyanghhungz, ngaem gyaeuj yawj dauqlaj, laj dindat haumyagmyag geij ciengh sang, daraiz vivi, hawj vunz roxnyinh hyoemgyaeuj mboeng bae.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dingqnaeuz, 1929 nienz 12 nyied 11 hauh, Baksaek hwnjhing gvaq le, vihliux hohmaenh aen gienz Suhveiziah Dahyougyangh, Youngyangh Suhveiziah Cwingfuj gietdingh gveeb gij cizeviginh Gyangheouh, Lizhih, Banghih, Lozhih seiq aen mhanj Bingzci Yen seizneix dwg Bingzgoj Si buenz Youngyangh Cizeveighh Duzlizyingz. 1930 nienz 5 nyied 13 hauh, Hungzcizginh Daihsam Cungdui Daihsam Yingz yingzcangi Gauh Cauz deng heuh daiq 200 lai houx hing daj Bahmaj Yen ganj daengz Gyangheouh, dajsuenq caeuq Youngyangh Cizeveighh Duzlizyingz guhdoh roomx haeuj Nazmaj bae, hoenx aeu Vujmingz, yaek youq Byaowz laeh guh gwnhgidi. Ngoenzhaenx lajhyonghngoenz, budui daeuj daengz Lohih seiz, deng Vangz Gveicauz, Veiz Yungyjen, Vangz Minz-buj daengj gyoengq caegeq dangdieg 800 lai vunz daeuj dangj roen. Aenvih vunzdig lai vunzraeuz noix, daihhet lienz lenzangi Senj Cauzwnh daiq roek boux bing youq haihlaeng hoenx dangj vunzdig, hoh gyenqg vunzlai dioqdauq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ciep daengz yinvu le, caet boux bing bouxboux vid gen daj ga mhouj lau saek di, gyoengqde ndoj gungx rin gvaq laj faex buet bae con dauq caeuq vunzdig doxhoenx, vunzdig yied dauq yied lai, sing cungq "hwnghwng humbum" yied daeuj yied deih, yied daeuj yied gaenh, lenzeangj Senj Cauzwnh yawj cingzgvang mhouj ndei, muengz daiq roek boux bing bin hwnj Byamax bae, naemj daengz gwnz bya le caiq ra roen deuz mingh. Caet boux bing daeuj daengz gwnz dingjbya le, cij rox goengq Byamax neix dwg goengq hyadog ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Baihbaek Byamax cungjdwg dathau sangvidvid, ra roen gvaqhae mbouj miz, vunzdig youq laj dinhya haiz haenz rang ndeu, lumj aen roi nei daj laj dinbya "roi" hwnj hya daeuj, yawjraen vunzdig yied daeuj yied guenh, caet boux Hungzcizginh couh hai cungq sawq vunzdig, hoenx daengz mbouj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: miz saek naed lwyyienz le, gyengqde couh daj gwnz hya gingi rin roengzdaeuj, hoenx ndaej gyoengq vunzdig daej hoh daej meh, ienq mhwn ienq ndaen. Gij rin gwnzhya cungj yungh liux lo, vunzdig couh yaek daeuj daengz gwnz dingihya lo, caet boux cansw doenaeuz, baenzlaw hix mbouj hawj vunzdig gaemh bae, gyoengqde fad cungq swhgeij raek hix, guhdoih ndwn youq dingihya, duihsing heuh: "Hungzginh fanhhi, gungcanjdangi fanhhi." Heuh sat, doengzcaez diuq roengz dat bae, dai caez lo, gyoengqde dwg: Senj Cauzwnh, Yangz Gojcangh, Sung Laujdwz, Lij Givwnz, Loz Dingdwz, Bangz Yozngwnh, Vangz Hizei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bangjhih Cin Lozhih Cunh Mbanjgyanghhungz naihlaux Veiz Yilenz dauqngeix naeuz, hihaenx de cih hi, ngoenzde hanringz miz sing cungq caeuq sing hemq daj mbanj nden cienz daeuj, vunzmbanj rox doxhoenx lo, houxgeq lwgnyez muengzfoedfoed deuz haeuj ndaw gamj gwnz byalaeng bae ndoj, mwh gyoengq Hungzginh diuq roengz dat daeuj, gyoengqde couh yawj ndaej gig cingcuj, miz roek boux doek daengz laj dat, houx ndeu gak youq gyangdat.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenz daihngcih, daxgoeng Veiz Yilenz caeuq vunzmbanj guhdoih hwnjbya bae, moek geij boux doek daengz laj haenx youq lajdat, vunzmbanj mhouj miz banhfap bin hwnj dat bae, couh noix boux gak gyangdat haenx mhouj ndaej moek. Bi 2006 vunzmbanj bin daengz gyangdat, cij raen gij goet houxdai haenx, gyoengq vunzmbanj couh cang gij goet de roengz ndaw gimdanz bae, caeuq roek boux ndaej moek haenx cuengq youq giz ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gvaqlaeng, gyoengqvunz ranghdieg haenx vihliux geiqniemh caet boux bing neix, couh heuh Byamax guh Byacaetsing, doeklaeng miz saw naeuz: "Baek miz Byalangzyaz, namz miz Byacaetsing." Couhdwg gizneix lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2006 nienz 4 nyied 5 hauh, gyoengqvunz Mhanjgyanghhungz ranzranz ok ngaenz, guh baenz aen moh ndeu, cangq caet houx Hungzginh diuq dat vutmingh haenx youq giz ndeu, lij youq ngoenzhaenx doengzdoih sauqmoh. Yaek sauqmoh gaxgonq, gyoengq vunzmbanj gag bae ra gyoengq beixnuengx caencik gyoengq houxbing vutmingh haenx, heuh gyoengqde daeuj itheij sauqmoh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bi 2013, Bingzgoj Si Yinzminz Cwngfuj haihij doenghong guh Byacaetsing Lezsw Lingzyenz, hi 2014 guh baenz. Seizneix, Byacaetsing gaenq baenz aen dieg son'gyauq hagseng baenzlawz bae ndiepgyaez guekcoj, dwg aen dieg dangjyenz ganbu ciepsouh gwzming cienzdoengj son'gyauq, dwg yo miz aen gojgaeq beiig gim lij bengz hawj gvoengq lwgminz mbouj lumz ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen Gangjmingz Gvendaengz «Gij Genyi Gvendaengz Ceiqdingh Aen Gveihva Haj Bi Daih Cibhaj Gozminz Ginghci Caeuq Sevei Fazcanj Cunghgung Cunghyangh»

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Faenh gauj《Genyi》daj aen gihhwnj dinghvih neix bae mauzveh mboengq "Cihhaj Haj" haenzlawz hwngfat, gawq caeuq gij leixniemh nem lohnaemj aen gveihva "Cihseiq Haj" daezok haenx doxciep, youh liuh cinj coglaeng 5 hi guek raeuz yaek haenzlawz hwngfat, daezok gij cungjdaej lohnaemj, yenczw hungnaek, cujyau moeghiu, canloz yinvu hab saedsaeh, yawj ndaej gyaae haenx. Aeu gaemdawz mboengq seizgan ndeileih raeuz neix, gyamaenh haigvangq gindei, cawz bae gigaz, boju giz dinj giz nyieg, youq ndaw gnzei beijak haenqrem hingz ndaej canloz cujdung, doidoengh gij canloz yinvu nangq daengz daengx aen yendaiva yiengh Cungguek ndaej daih cunghyoengq, saedbauj hyaij ok yamq ndaej gietdingh daihdaej guhbaenz sevei cujyi yendaiva.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihngeh, gvendaengz gij moegbiu ginghei sevei fazeanj mboengq "Cihhaj Haj". Hableix laebdingh gij moeghiu hwngfat, doiq ceiqdingh caeuq saedhengz ndei haj hi gveihva youggaenj dangqmaz Faenh gauj《Genyi》dawzndei gij gihwwnj dinghvih caeuq gij iugouz duenhmhaek mboengg "Cihhaj Haj", mingzheg doekdingh le gij cuiyau moeghiu ginghei sevei fazeanj. 2035 nienz daihdaej guhhaenz sevei cuiyi yendaiva, aen cijhyauh ndaej guh huigeiq youqgaenj ndeu couh dwg gij swnghcanj cungjciz ndaw guek dan hingz daengz gak boux haenx dahdaengz yiengh sujhingz aen guekgya cungdaengj fatdad, neix iugouz mboengg "Cihhaj Haj" ginghei sevei au baujicz vaiqmenh habdanqq bae hwingfat. Faenh gauj《Genyi》ginggvaq haeujlaeg yenzgiu caeuq hableix lwnheingq le, daezok doengh gij moeghiu youqgaenj haudaengz ginghei demmaj haujiz youq nadw duenh hableix, daengx gaiq yausu swnghcanjliz onjbouh daezswng, gij rengzndumj ginghei demmaj ndaej cuengqlangh gaeuqdh, gihminz souhaeuj demmaj caeuq ginghei demmaj doengzbouh, cienzhong hienq lai caeuq lauzdung swnghcanjliz hienq sang doengzbouh, gyoengq vunz souhaeuj cungdaengj lienzdaemh gyalai daengj. Doengzseiz, ngeix daengz mhoengq neix gij vwnidz ginghci ndaw guek gyodroengz aplig gyalai, gij aeuyungh mizyauq mbouj gaeuq daengj, faenh gauj《Genyi》daezok aeu hawj gihminz siueiq hienq lai mingzyienj, gij aeuyungh ndaw guek guh rengzgoek laehdaej hienq ak bae ragdoengh ginghei demmaj daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ciuq gij guhfap doenghbaez, faenh gauj《Genyi》daezok gij moeghiu ginghci sevei fazcanj mboengq "Cibhaj Haj" cujyau dwg doekdingh iugouz, gidij itdingh aeu dabdaengz aen liengh lawz caeuq gidij guh lawz baijbouh hongsaeh couh louz daengz mwh ceiqdingh aen gveihva《Ganghyau》caiq yenzgiu doekdingh, baenzneix cij ndaej yienh' ok caeuq langh' ok gij rengz《Genyi》guh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihsam, gvendaengz aeu doidoengh yiengh hwngfat coh ceiq ndei guh cawjdaez. 《Genyi》 caeuq aen gveihva "Cihseiq Haj" caemh meg doxciep, laebdaeh doekdingh doinyoengx yiengh hwngfat coh ceiq ndei guh gij cawjdaez ginghei sevei fazcanj moengq "Cibhaj Haj", iugouz dingjmaenh aeu guhhoengh ginghei guh goek, caezeingi dengcinj cienzmienh hengg ndei gij leixniemh hwngfat moq, guh daenzg caetliengh caen hwnj mhaek moq caeuq soqliengh demmaj hableix, doinyoengx ginghei lienzdaemh cangqvuengh hwngfat caeuq ndawbiengz yienghyiengh ndei doxhae. Doinyoengx yiengh hwngfat coh ceiq ndei, ceiq youggaenj dwg gyavaiq hawg gij gohgi sujinggs sang ndaej gag guh gag ak, gyarengz hwngfat yiengh swnghcanjliz rengzmoq, youq doinyoengx gohgi cauhmoq, gyavaiq gungganq yiengh rengznyoengx moq, coinyoengx gapgyaq ginghei gaiindei hwnj mhaek fuengmienh caen raenhamq caen miz cunghyoengq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Faenh gauj《Genyi》daegbied dawznaek aeu gohgi cauhmoq guh dazyinx, youw hwnguh aen dijhi yiengh canjnieh hab ciuhneix, gyavaiq hawj gij gohgi suijbingz sang ndaej gag guh gag ak, gyavaiq ginghic sevei fazcanj cienj coh loggsaek liuxcaez daengj fuengmienh guh ok haijbouh, daezok guijndei daeszwg gij canjnieh doenghbaez, ganqok guhhung gij canjnieh ngamq hwnq caeuq gij canjnieh daengzog, gyamaenh guhhung gij goekgaen yiengh ginghci saeddac

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daezok gyarengz guh yiengh cauhmoq haeznduj caeuq gungroengz gij gisuz ceiq youqgaenj, doinyoengx gohgi cauhmoq caeuq canjnieh cauhmoq yungzhah haeuj laeg bae, gyoehgyonj doicaenh gyauyuz gohgi vunzcaiz hwngfat, haeujaleg doicaenh hwnqguh soqcih Cungguek

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daezok gyavaiq hwnqugh aen dijhi wngzyenz yienghmoq, gyavaiq cauxbaenz yiengh swngheanj swnghhoz loegsaek. Gij aeu louzsim de dwg, fazcanj yiengh swnghcanjliz rengzmoq iugouz bonjfaenh miz diuzgienh miz gizak cij haenz, ndigah, aeu negix ndei dwg mbouj dwg caen miz diuzgienh guh, faenh gauj《Genyi》daegbied gangj daengz aeu ciuq cingzgvang bonjfaenh bae fazcanj yiengh swnghcanjliz rengzmoq, couh dwg aeu dazyinx daihgya gohyoz singjsag, ciuq saed ciuq caen bae guh hongsaeh, fuengzre bae zangj couh luenhrobroh bae guh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihseiq, gvendaengz guh ak ndaw guek daih baenqloek, hawj ndaw guek rog guek baenqloek doengrat bae. Gij vanzging baihrog yied yiemzhaenq fukcah, yied aeu gyavaiq cauhlaeb aen gvaenghgaq hwngfat moq, gaemmaenh hwngfat youq ndaw fwngz raeuz. Seizneix caeuq gvaqlaeng mboengq ndeu, aeu dingjmaenh guh ak yiengh saeh ndaw guek baenqloek, gyavaiq guhbaenz aen dijhi ginghei baenqcienj ndaw guek maenh ak, aeu ndaw guek baenqloek onjdingh bae dijsiu rog guek baenqloek yiengh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Faenh gauj《Genyi》daegbied dawznaek guh ak ndaw guek haenqloek, doiq hwngguh aen hawciengz ndaw guek maenh' ak, gyavaiq cauhlaeb aen dijci yiengh hawciengz ginghei sevei cuyi suijhingz sang hae guh' ok baijbouh, daegbied gangj daengz dawzmaenh gyadaih gij aeuyungh ndaw guek aen giekdaej canloz neix, dawzmaenh ndeileih beksingq caeuq coihwng siufeiq, douzwh coq huq caeuq douzwh coq vunz gaenjmaed giethah, haenqrengz guhhoengh siufeiq, gyadaih gij douzwh raenhamq, laemxsim huqcawz giz laengz giz saek gazngaih hwnguh aen hawciengz hungloet daengx guek caezcaemh, daegbied gangj daengz lailai gikfat gij rengzhoengg gak loih ginghyingz cawjdaej, gyavaiq laehndei aen dijci gihci youz hawciengz ndahoiq yausu, engq ndei ceihleix hungzgvanh ginghci. Doengzseiz, daezok haigvanqg gij miengloh rog guek haenqloek, onhouh gya' gwangq hailangcidu doiqciep gozci, henhoh aen dijci lai mbiengi mouyiz, caetlieng sang bae caezlaeh "it rangh it loh".

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihhaj, gvendaengz daengx-cungq yinzminz doengzcaez fouqmiz hyaij ok yamqdin maenhsaed. Gij yendaiva yiengh Cungguek dwg gj yendaiva daengxcungq yinzminz doengzcaez fougmiz. Cihbet Daih Dangj raeuz doxdaeuj, dou seizseiz cungj mbouj lumz simnduj, ndwn youq mbiengj yinzminz bae ngeix wvndiz, doinyoengx gvaengxdieg doxdaengh hwngfat, yungh banhfp ndaejrengz bae haujcang caeuq gajjndei gwdaenqj heksingq, dwkhingz ciengz cienqg haenqrengz duetungz, cienzmienh hwnqhaenz aen hiengz siujgangh, cauh'ok le diuzgienh ndei bae coengh doengzcaez fouqmiz. Faenh gauj《Genyi》youq ndaw cijdauj swhsiengj daeghied gangj naeuz daengxcungq yinzminz doengzcaez fouqmiz yamq ok yamqdin maenhsac, neix dwg aen iugouz daengxbuenz dazyinx ginghci sevei fazcanj mboengq "Cihhaj Haj".

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Faenh gauj《Genyi》gaenjndaet dawzndei gj moegbi iugouz doengzcaez fouqmiz, hopheux haucang caeuq gaijndei gwndaenj beksingq, youq coihawj couhnieb youh lai youh ndei, laebndei gij cidu faenhoiq souhaeuj, banhndei yiengh gyauyuz yinzminz habhoz, laebcaez gij djihji haujcang ndawbiengz, doinyoengx hangz fangzdicanj hwnfgt coh ceiq ndei, gyaaviq hwnqguh ndangcangq Cungguek, coihawj vunzgyaeuj gig ndei bae fatmaj, onjbouh doihaeuj yiengh fugsaeh caezcaemh ceiq noix houxboux doxdoengz daengj fuengmienh, haijhouh buek cwngewz banhfap doxdaengh youh ngaih guh daengz neu. Daj suikiq gvaengxdieg cengca, singz mhanj cahied bae naemj, youq gyaaviq nungzyez nungzcunh yendaiva, maenhsaead coinyoengx cienzmienh hwnfgt lajmbanj, gaijndei gij haijhouh ginghci gvaengxdieg,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: doinyoengx gyaengxdieg doxdaengh hwnfgt daengj fuengmienh, haijhouh buek guhfap saedcaih ndeu. Daj coicaenh gij cingsaenz swnghhoz yinzminz doengzcaez fouqmiz bae naemj, daezok hwngcienz caeuq hengzguh aen hwzsinh gyacizgvanh sevei cujyi, haenqrengz gaujhoengh gij saehnieb vwnzva, gyaaviq fazcanj gij canjnieh vwnzva, hawj Cunghvaz vwnzmingz cienzboq engq gyaey yingyjangj engq gvanqg.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihroek, gvendaengz doeng-buenz maeuzveh hwngfat caeuq ancienz. Youq onj le cijndaej maeuz hwngfat, hwngfat le cijndaej bauj youq onj. Coglaeng 5 bi, guek raeuz yaek miz gak cungj yinhsu fungyiemj mbouj doekdingh nanz liuh daengz haenzy yied daeuj yied lai, gij yinvu doengbuenz maeuzveh hwngfat caeuq ancienz engqgya gannanz. Faenh gauj 《Genyi》 hopheux doicaenh aen dijhi caeuq gij bonjsaeh bauj hawj guekgya ancienz hab eiuhneix, daezok laebcaez aen dijhi bauj guekgya ancienz de, gyaak gij bonjsaeh youq doengh aen lingyiz cungdenj bauj guekgya ancienz, daezsang gij suijhingz ceihleix hawj goenggungh ancienz, laebndei aen dijhi ceihleix ndawhiengz. Hopheux caetliengh sang bae doicaenh gozfangz caeuq hingdoih hab ciuhneix, daezok gyaaiq guh ak gij rengzhoenxcienqg akmoq, doicaenh yieng saeh ceihleix hingsaeh hab ciuhneix, gyamaeh gij dijhi caeuq giaak gij bonjsaeh gyoehgyonj maeuzveh canloz guekgya.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihcaet, gvendaengz dingj-maenh yienghyieng aeu Dangi lingjduaj. Gaemmaenh caeuq gyaak yienghyiengh cungj aeu Dangi lingjduaj dwj daj goekgaen hauj raeuz doihaeuj gij yendaiva yieng Cungguek. Faenh gauj《Genyi》 daj hawj Dangi engq ak engq rox lingjduaj ginghei sevei fazcanj bae naemi, giengzdiuh dawzmaenh caeuq gyaak Dangjcunghyangh gynojcomz lingj-dauj, laehndei aen ghei haijhou doeksaeo gij gezowz hungnaek Dangjcunghyangh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: laehdae yungh gij lijlun cauhmoq aen Dangi daeuj dungjyiz swhsiengj, dungjyiz ceiqheiq, dungjyiz hengzdoeng

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gaemmaenh aen yinxyiengq cingqdeng yungh vunz, laehndei aen ghei gaujhaed hingzgyaq ganbu

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: doenghuenz maeuzveh youq gak aen lingyiz doicaenh gihwngz dangjcuiciz gensez

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: laehdae mhouj cuengqsoeng doeksaeo gij cingsaenz het hangh gviding duh cunghyangh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: laehndei aen dijhi gamduk duh Dangi caeuq guekgya

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: laemxsim dwk-ndei ciengz ciengq haenqrengz naih-nanz daengxhuenz fanj nduknaeuh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gak boux dungzei, saemjlnwh doenggvaq aen gveihva《Genyi》“Cibhaj Haj”, dwg gij yinvu youqgaenj baez cienzhoih neix. Daihgya aeu nyinhcaen ngeixnaemj, yaenglwnh haeujlaeg bae, daezok gij yigen caeuq genyi haenzyungh, caemh hai ndei baez cienzhoih neix, gaij ndei faenh gauj《Genyi》neix.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Guhhak Gaemgienz Vih Lwgminz …… Lingz Siuyangh 51

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yiz Ciz: Seiqeib Bi Simnduj Mbouj Bienq…… Dwngz Dwngz 53

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou Dwg Bouxgaemgeiz, Gou Miznaj…… Yaz Yuzyij 59

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Doz Fungmienh: Feihyiz Hoengh Cieng …… Swhgiz ingj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: dwg boux beksingq ndeu, gyahdingz gvanhnen naekna, doiq gij swnghhoz budui caengz sibgvenq, mbouj rox ginhsw gisuz. Vih onjdingh cansw moq, sawj gyoengqde caenhvaiq sibgvenq gij swnghhoz budui, caenhvaiq bienqbaenz gij cansw suglienh, raeuz bietdingh aeu cietsaed ganhoj bae guh haujlai gunghcoz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raeuz mbouj ndaej doengzeiq cungj yawjafp neix, nyinhnaeuz cungi cienzbouh yungh gij guhfap cangigvanh yiemzleih dungici haenx, couh ndaej dabdaengz aen muzdiz gwnzneix gangj daengz haenx. Danghyenz, gij giliz yiemzgek caeuq gij gaemguenj hableix ndaw budui dwg bietdingh aeu miz, hoeng neix dwg mbouj gaeuq, lijyahguiz aeu cwngci gunghcoz daeuj boiqhab. Raeuz mboujdan aeu vujcangh gij dinfwngz gyoengq cansw, daegbied youqgaenj dwg vujcangh gij ukgyaeuj cansw. Cungi yungh gij banhfap apnaenx, daengz doeksat, couhinj youq biujmienh sou ndaej saek di yaugoj, hix baenzbaenz mbouj dwg gaenjmaenh, engq mbouj ndaej fazyangg gij swdungsing gyoengq cansw, da cansw swhgeij gyozvu ndawde fatseng ok gij candou vilig fouzbeij haenx, daegbied mbouj ndaej youq yienghlawz gunnanz vanzing ndawde lij baujciz itheij bae cih-cicz ganhoj doucwngh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cwngci gunghcoz, youq gyamaenh cansw moq caeuq daezsang gij candouliz gyoengqde fuengmienh, dwg wngdang*caemhcaiq goj-wngz fazveih gij cozyung gig daih de.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq ciepsou bing moq seiz, bietdingh aeu caeuq aen gihgvanh ciubing doxgap, guh gij naicam caeuq angqsoengq hoenghhwd

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: youq gwnz roen haibuet bae cenzsen haenx, caenhliengh cujciz song henz roen ginzcung bae angqcoux caeuq angqsoengq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: caemhcaiq youq ndaw ciepsou budui yezlez angcoux.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cansw moq daengz budui le, wngdang soujsien liujgaij ciusou seiz gij cingzgvang haenx, gij simcingz cansw, caeuq gij vwndiz goj-nwngz fatseng haenx, cimdoiq doengh gij neix, gibseiz bae cekgangj, daegbied dwg aeu sikhaek gyagiengz gang Yiz gyauyuz, daezsang gij gyozvu cansw moq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq ndaw budui, wngdang dungyenz gyoengq cansw laux, dizcang gij cingsaenz doxndei doxgyaez, fatdoengh cansw laux bangcoh cansw moq hagsib ginhsw caeuq cwngci, fanjdui gij yienhsiengq laux bing hangz saen bing. Doengzseiz, louzsim gunghawj gij gwndaenj cansw moq, caenhrengz gemjnoix gij gunnanz caeuq haemzhoj cansw moq, sawj cansw moq roxnyinh cingsaenz vaiqvued. Neix dwg aen yinhsu youqgaenj sawj budui onjdingh ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dizcang hableix gaemguenj, yungh engq lai gyauyuz gangjfug

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: DIUQNIEMH LIUZ BWZCWNGZ .. 186 1986 nienz 10 nyied 21 hauh YUNGH GIJ SAENQNIEMH GIENDINGH DAWZ YINZMINZ DOXGIET HWNJDAEUJ .. 191 1986 nienz 11 nyied 9 hauh GIYEZ GAIJGWZ CAEUQ GINHYUNGZ GAIJGWZ .. 193 1986 nienz 12 nyied 19 hauh GEIZHAUH SIENMINGZ BAE FANJDUI SWHCANJGAIHGIZ SWYOUZVA .. 195 1986 nienz 12 nyied 30 hauh BAIZCAWZ GAUXCA, LAEBDAEB BAENAJ .. 199 1987 nienz 1 nyied 13 hauh GYAGIENGZ SEIQ HANGH GIHBWNJ YENZCWZ GYAUYUZ, GENHCIZ GAIJGWZ HAILANGH CWNGCWZ .. 202 1987 nienz 1 nyied 20 hauh GIVA CAEUQ HAWCIENGZ CUNGJ DWG GIJ FUENGFAP FAZCANJ SWNGHCANJLIZ .. 204 1987 nienz 2 nyied 6 hauh YUNGH GIJ LIZSIJ CUNGGUEK BAE GYAUYUZ BOUXCOZ .. 205 1987 nienz 2 nyied 18 hauh CUNGGUEK DAN NDAEJ BYAIJ DIUZ LOH SEVEICUJYI .. 208 1987 nienz 3 nyied 3 hauh MIZ LINGJDAUJ MIZ CIZSI BAE GUH SEVEICUJYI GENSEZ .. 211 1987 nienz 3 nyied 8 hauh BAENZLAWZ BINGZGYA GIJ CWNGCI DIJCI AEN GUEKGYA NDEU .. 214 1987 nienz 3 nyied 27 hauh GIJ VAH CAEUQ YANGHGANGJ DAEGBIED HINGZCWNGGIH GIHBWNJFAZ GIJCAUJ VEIJYENZVEI VEIJYENZ

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: CUNGHGOZ GUNGCANJDANGJ DAIH CIB NGEIH BAEZ DAENGX GUEK DAIBYAUJ DAIHHOIH GAIHMUSWZ

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj Daih Cib Ngeih Baez Daengx Guek Daibyauj Daihhoih seizneix gaihmu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raeuz baez daibyauj daihhoih neix, gij cujyau yicwngz miz sam hangh: 1 Saemjcz daujuln daih cib it gai cunghyangh veijyenzvei aen baugau de, dinghcinj gij ganghlingi dangj vih cienzmienh haiok aen gizmen moq seveicujyi yendaiva gensez haenqrengz bae guh haenx

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2 Saemjcz daujuln caeuq doenggvaq aen《Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj Canghcwngz》 moq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 3 Ciuq dangjcangh moq gvidingh, senjok aen cunghyangh veijyenzvei. cunghyangh guvwn veijyenzvei caeuq cungh-yangh giliz genjcz veijyenzvei moq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Guhbaenz gij yinvu baez daibyauj daihhoih neix, aen dangj raeuz doiq seveicujyi yendaiva gensez gij cijdauj swhsiengj de couh engqgya mingzbeg, dangj dih gensez couh ndaej engq hab lizsij seizgeiz moq sihyau, gij ceiq sang lingjdauicwngz ndaw dangj couh ndaej saedyienh bancoz bangeq doxgap caeuq doxlawh, bienqbaenz aen candou cijveihbu engqgya miz cingsaenz engqgya miz ceiqheiq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dauqyawj gij lizsij dangj raeuz, baez daibyauj daihhoih neix, yaek dwg daj dangj daihcaet baez daengx guek daibyauj daihhoih 1 doxdaeuj baez veiyi ceiq youqgaenj ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1945 nienz dangj daihcaet baez daengx guek daibyauj daihhoih youz Mauz Cwzdungh dungzci fucwz ciuhai haenx, dwg dangj raeuz daj laeb dangj doxdaeuj minzcuj gwzming seizgeiz baez daibyauj daihhoih ceiq youqgaenj he. Baez daihhoih haenx cungjgez le guek raeuz ngeih cib lai bi minzcuj gwzming ngutngeuj fazcanj ndaej ok gij lizsij ginghyen de, dingh'ok gij ganghlingj caeuq cwzloz gig deng haenx, haekfug gij swhsiengj loekloeng ndaw dangj, hawj daengx dangj gij yinsiz youq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen dangj raeuz seizneix gaenq dwg aen dangj hung he, de gaenq miz sam cien gouj bak fanh dangjyenz, lingjdauj daengx guek cwinggenz Hoeng youq daengx guek yinzmin ndawde, gungcanjdangjyenz dauqdaej cij ciemq siujsoq. Aen dangj raeuz daezok gak hangh yinvu naek, mbouj miz saek hangh mbouj dwg baengh daengxgyoengq yinzminz sinhoj roengzrengz cij guh ndaej baenz. Youq gizneix, gou daibyauj aen dangj raeuz, yiengq daengx guek gunghyinz. nungzmin caeuq cihsiz fwnswj youq ndaw seveicujyi gensez guhhong dwgrengz sinhoj neix, byaujsi cungzgauh gingqeiq, yiengq gangdiet cangzcwngz Cunghgoz Yinzminz Gaijfangginh baujvei guekcoj ancienz caeuq seveicujyi gensez neix, byaujsi cungzgauh gingqeiq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Guek raeuz gak aen minzcuj dangjbai youq minzcuj gwzming seizgeiz caeuq aen dangj raeuz doengzcaez haenqrengz guh, youq seiveicujyi seizegz caeuq aen dangj raeuz doengzcaez byaij doxbae, doengzceiz souh gaujniemh. Baezneix doxbae youq ndaw gensez, aen dangj raeuz lij aeu caeuq sojmiz doengh aen minzcuj dangjbai gyaezguek haenx

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: caeuq doengh boux minzcuj yinzsw gyaezguek haenx ciengzgeiz doxgap. Youq gizneix, gou daibyauj aen dangj raeuz, yiengq gak minzcuj dangjbai caeuq gyoengq baengzyoux fouz dangjbai haenx, byaujsi caensim docih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij saehnieb dangj raeuz ndaej miz cienz seiqgyaiq cinbu yinzsw caeuq doengh aen guekgya caeuq raeuz doxndei haenx cihciz bangcoh. Youq gizneix, gou daibyauj aen dangj raeuz, yiengq gyoengqde byaujsi caensim docih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raeuz itdingh aeu siujsim nyinhcaen bae guh ndei gij hong bonjfaenh, gyagiengz caeuq daengx guek gak cuz yinzminz donzgez, gyagiengz caeuq daengx seiqgyaiq yinzminz donzgez, vih dawz aen guek raeuz gensez baenz aen seveicujyi yendaiva guekgya, gig vwnzmingz, gig minzcuj haenx, vih fanjdui bagenzcujyi, veizhu seiqgyaiq hozbingz, doicaenh gij cinbu saehnieb yinzlei hawj de byaij baenaj, haenqrengz bae guh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: YOUQ CUNGHYANGH GUVWN VEIJYENZVEI DAIH'IT BAEZ DAENGXCUNGQ VEIYI GWNZDE GANGJ GIJ VAH HAENX *

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cunghyangh guvwn veijenzvei dwg yiengh doxgaiq moq ndeu, dwg gaengawq gij saedsaeh cingzgvang Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj cij laeb hwnjdaeuj, dwg cungj cujciz hingzsik gaijgez dangj raeuz cunghyangh lingjdauj gihgou coz laux doxlawh ndeu. Muzdiz dwg sawj cunghyangh veijenzvei nenzginghva, doengzseiz hawj bouhfaenh dungzci laux doiq ok daih'it sienq le lij ndaej laebdaeb fazveih itdingh cozyung.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Coengz moux cungj yiyi daeuj gangj, guvwn veijyenzvei dwg cungj cujicz hingzsik daiqmiz gvaqdoh singciz ndeu. Guekgya raeuz hix ndei, dangj raeuz hix ndei, gij ceiq gaenbonj de wnggai dwg laeb duiyouh cidu. Cib it gai samcungh cenzvei gvaqlaeng mbouj geij nanz, raeuz couh gangj yaek dawz gij dangj caeuq guekgya lingjdauj cizvu dang daengz dai aen cidu saedsaeh mizyouq neix cawz bae. Aen vwndiz neix, gwnz seiqgyaiq haujlai guekgya gou lau cungj beij raeuz gaijgez ndaej ndei. Gij cingzgvang ganbu nienzgeij daiq laux raeuz mbouj gangj dwg cibfaen youqgaenj, ceiqsiuj hix miz gouj faen buenq youqgaenj. Aen vwndz neix mbouj gaijgez, aen guekgya raeuz. aen dangj raeuz couh mbouj miz rengzhoengh. Seizneix doenghfwngz bae gaijgez, caijyungh guvwn veijyenzvei cungi gvaqdoh hingzsik neix, haemq hab gij saedsaeh cingzgvang raeuz, haemq onjdangq, haemq swnh. Wngdang gangj, baez

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: * Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj Daih Cib Ngeih Baez Daengx Guek Daibyauj Daihhoih gietdingh laebbaenz caemhcaiq senjgij canjswngh le cunghyangh guvwn veijyenzvei. Cib ngeih gai itcungh cenzvei senjgij Dwng Siujbingz dungzci guh cunghyangh cwngcigiz veijyenz, cunghyangh cwngcigiz cangzvu veijyenz, gietdingh de nyaemb cunghyangh ginhveij cujsiz. Youq gwnz cunghyangh guvwn veijyenzvei daih'it baez daengxcungq veiyi, de dangsenj guh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: hung, baiz ndongi bw, beij gij baiz cunghyang veijyenzvei cwngzyenz lij ndongi bw. Baezlaeng gij cwngzyenz cunghyang veijyenzvei yied daej yied nienzoiq, yied daeuj yied dwg gyoengq daihlaeng raeuz. Gij daidu raeuz cwggoz, doiq doidoengh gij gunghcoz gyoengqde, bang gij gunghcoz gyoengqde, gig miz ndeicawq. Danghnaeuz gauj ndaej mbouj habdangq, hix aiq daiq daeuj yingjyangj mbouj ndei. Mboujdan gaej fuengzngaih gij gunghcoz cunghyangh veijyznvei, baudaengz gij gunghcoz cunghyangh cwgcigiz, suhgicu, hix gaej fuengzngaih gij gunghcoz baihlaj gak gaep. Lumjbaenz gij dungzci raeuz bae daengz aen swngj lawz liujgaij cingzgvang, gou yawj gaej seizbienh fazbyauj yigen, soujsien aeu nyinhcaen diucaz yenzgiu, yozsiz gij saedsaeh ginghyen baihlaj. Raen miz gij vwndiz saedcaih sihyau gaijgez haenx, hix whggai caijyungh cungj banhfap bangcoh swngjeij roxnaeuz bangcoh moux aen gihcwngz cujicz, hawj gyoengqde swhgeij bae gaiijgez. Aeu louzsim bae guh cienz bang daiq, cix mbouj dwg -bae roengz mingling, guh cijveih. Raeuz doengh gij swhgwz laux neix, gangj vah miz vunz dingq, miz gaenliengx, ndigah aeu siujsim. Raeuz daj haidaeuz couh aeu louzsim aen vwndiz neix. Duenh gonq Cangh Yin 4 dungzci bae daengz Fuzgen gunghcoz le song ndwen lai, de youq gizhaenx couh guh ndaej gig ndei ma.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihngieh, gij cwngzyenz guvwn veijyenzvei aeu lienzhaeh ginz-cung. Ndaej mbouj ndaej yienghneix naemjsuenq, cawz gij dungzci ndangdaej mbouj ndei caixvaih, fanzdwg boux lij guh ndaej di gunghcoz he, gojyij lienzhaeh saek aen gihcwngz danhvei, lumjbaenz lienzhaeh saek aen gunghcangj, saek aen hagdangz, saek aen gohyoz yenzgiu gihgvanh, saek aen diveijj roxnaeuz yenveij, cigdaengz saek aen gihcwngz cujciz lajmbanj, haejjlaeg bae liujgaij cingzgvang. Yienghneix couh ndaej engq ndei bae doiq dangjcunghyangh fazveih canhmouz caeuq bangfwngz cozyung. Daengz aen danhvei lienzhaeh haenx, lij ndaej guh boux baugauyenz ndeu, caeuq ginzcung doxraen, caeuq dangjyenz doxraen, dawz gij saehcingz guekgya raeuz, dawz dangj raeuz moix aen seizegz caiyjungh gij fuengcim cwncgwz haenx, dawz gozci cingzgvang caeuq gij doiq rog cwncgwz raeuz, gibseiz gangjnaeuz gyoengqde nyi. Guh baugau bonjndang couh dwg cienz bang daiq. Gojyij gangj gij vwndiz seizneix, hix gojyij gangj lizsij. Gangj lizsij, raeuz dwg ceiq miz swhgwz, cungj dwg gij vunz guh gwzming geij cib bi lo, gij goj gwzming lai dangqmaz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihsam, raeuz vanzlij gojyij fazveih aen cozyung ndeu dem, couh dwg youq baujciz gij cozfungh ndei dangj raeuz fuengmienh bae daiqdaeuz guh ndei. Gauj cingsaenz vwnzmingz, gvanhgen dwg

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dou ngamq hai gvaq aen dangj daih 12 baez daengx guek daibyauj daihhoih 5 . 12 Da gvaqlaeng, gij cwngci hingzsi guek dou engqgya onjdingh, ndaej engq ndei bae itsim iteiq guh gensez lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij fwdou muzbyauh 12 Da daezok haenx, dwg 20 bi fan song fan 6 . 20 bi dwg daj 1981 nienz suenq hwnj, daengz aen sigi neix satbyai. Daihdaej faen song bouh byaij, 10 bi gonq roengz ndei giekdaej, 10 bi laeng vaiqvaiq fazcanj. Canloz cungdenj, it dwg nungzyez, ngeih dwg nwgzyenz caeuq gyaudoeng, sam dwg gyauyuz caeuq gohyoz. Guh ndei gyauyuz caeuq gohyoz gunghcoz, gou yawj aen neix dwg gvanhgen. Mbouj miz yinzcaiz mbouj ndaej, mbouj miz cihsiz mbouj ndaej, "Vwnzva Dagwzming" aen daih loekloeng ndeu dwg nguh bae 10 bi mbouj beizyangj yinzcaiz. Seizneix aeu cagaenj fazcanj gyauyuz saehnieb.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 12 Da diq gij dungzci doenghbaez famh gvaq loekloeng haenx cawqceq ndaej haemq nyinhcaen siujsim. Dwkoisq "Swyinzbangh" le, dangseiz gij dungzci guhdaeuz gaemguenj cunghyang gunghcoz haenx genhciz diuz cwngci lusen "coj", youh daezok diuz swhsiengj lusen loekloeng, heuhguh "song aen fanzdwg" 7 . Gou gangj gvaq, danghnaez Mauz cujsiz lij lix, de hix mbou swngzinyih "song aen fanzdwg", aenvih gij haenx mbouj dwg Majlezcujyi. Mauzcwz-dunghswhsiengj. Danghnaeuz ciuq "song aen fanzdwg", gou couh mbouj ndaej okdaeuj gunghcoz, engq mbouj yungh gangj gij vwndiz wng dem lo. Gou dwg youq dwksoiq "Swyinzbangh" gvaqlaeng gouj ndwen, couh dwg 1977 nienz 7 nyied cij okdaeuj gunghcoz, daengz seizhaenx gou cijndaej camgya cunghyang veiyi. Gou okdaeuj le,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: * Neix dwg Dwng Siujbingz dungzci buenx Cauzsenh Lauzdungdangj Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei cungjsuhgi Ginh Yizcwngz bae Swconh fangjvwn seiz youq gyangroen gangj gij vah haenx ndawde bouhfaenh ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: GVANGJSIH BOUXCUENGH SWCIGIH SAUJSU MINZCUZ YIJYENZ VWNZSW GUNGHCOZ VEIJYENZVEI BIEN

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij Cingzfaenh Sawcuengh Gou …… Cinz Gozswngh 17 Gou Gyaez Sawcuengh …… Veiz Hangoz 20 Bauq Sawcuengh Yinx Gou Baenaj …… Lij Faz 22 Gou Maij Hong Lauxsae Sawcuengh …… Couh Meijlanz 24 Sawcuengh Sawj Gou Najrongh …… Luz Sucingh 26 Gou Buenx Sawcuengh Daengx Ciuhvunz …… Cinz Vaizswngh 28 Sim Maengx Hag Yungh Saw Bonjfaenh … Dwngz Mingzsinh 29 Baengh Fuk Sawcuengh Daengz Baekging …… Gvanh Swgingh 32 Guh Yinhoyz Rox Sawcuengh Miz Yungh …… Nungz Gvangh 34 Gou Caeuq Sawcuengh …… Cinz Boh 36 Sawcuengh, Aen Daeng Rongh Dungx Gou … Luz Yinghcaiz 38 Gou Gyaez Sawcuengh …… Liz Gyahlinz 40 Sawcuengh Hawj Gou Engq Miznaj …… Lij Yinzciz 43 Guhhong Gyaeugetget …… Mungz Feih 45 Docih Mwngz, Sawcuengh …… Yiz Ciz 47 Sawcuengh Buenx Gou Gvaq Bigeq …… Lij Yinzcungh 49 Cingz Sawcuengh …… Hoz Genveij 51

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ciuhgonq, miz doiq gvanbaz he, bouxgvan heuhguh Daegfwnz, vunz lauxsaed, gaenx guhhing

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: mehyah heuhguh Dahgyoij, vunz gyaeundei youh coegmingz ling-zleih. Song gvanbaz doxgyaez doxndiep, saedceij gvaq ndaej gig ndei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gwnz haw miz boux caiczawj ndeu, ndaw ranz yahlaux yahnoix baenz bang. Hoeng, de lij yiem noix, baez raen dah-sau lawz gyaeundei, couh duenghduenghragag, gaem dawz mbouj cuengq. Bouxboux cungj haemz de.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenz he, caiczawj caeuq saeyez② hwnj ndoi bae youz, raen Dahgyoij youq henz rij saeg buh. Caiczawj baez raen, hozhaenz mya'myub, couh cam saeyez: “Dah neix gyaeundei raixcaix, dwg lwgsau bouxlawz”? Saeyez naeuz: “Dwg mehyah Daegfwnz.” Caiczawj dingq le, gag danqheiq gangj: “Ai, dujva mauxdan baenzneix gyaeu, vih maz baek roengz gong haex vaiz bae ne? Hojsik lai lo.” Saeyez baez dingq, rox ndawsim caiczawj siengj gijmaz lo, couh gangj: “Lauxyez, mwngzsiengj aeu de hix mbouj nanz, gou miz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: aen banhfap he, bau mwngz lauh ® ndaej. Caiczawj couh gipmuengz cam: “ Miz maz banhfap, vaiq di gangj vei?” Saeyez couh gangj gij banhfap de okdaeuj, caiczawj dingq liux, ngaek gyaeuj naeuz ndei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Haet laeng, caiczawj caeuq saeyez saet gwnz dawz laj, gaemh dawz duz meuz raiz he, mboengj dai le, cuengq youq ndaw bakcauq, aeu haz cw dwk, yungjyat gvaq le, saeyez couh ok haw bae caj Daegfwnz daeuj gai fwnz. Yaep he, Daegfwnz rap fwnz gvaqdaeuj lo, saeyez cam: “ Daegfwnz, rap fwnz mwngz aeu geijlai cienz?” Daegfwnz han: “ Bak haj cienz.” Saeyez riunyaen gangj: “ Bak haj cienz bengz lai, noix di gai lwi?” Daegfwnz mbouj swt de, rap fwnz couh byaij. Saeyez gipmuengz naeuz: “ Bak haj couh bak haj, rap riengz gou daeuj.” Daegfwnz rap fwnz riengz de bae lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daengz ranz caiczawj, saeyez heuh de cuengq haeuj bakcauq bae. Ngamq cuengq ndei, caiczawj youq ndaw rug doq hemq saeyez, “ duzmeuz bauj mbouj raen lo!” Song boux couh cang guh ra meuz, ra daengz bakcauq, saeyez baez buen rap fwnz Daegfwnz hwnjdaeuj, couh hemq naeuz: “ Lauxyez ha, meuz bauj deng dimz ④ dai lo.” Caiz-

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: yiehnh.” Caiczawj naeuz: “ Fanjcingq” mwngz dimz duz meuz bauj gou dai, itdingh aeu boiz.”

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daegfwnz deng bikdwk mbouj miz banhfap. couh naeuz: " Boiz couh boiz ba. Hoeng, mwngz sien hawj cienz fwnz gou gonq, gvaq yaep ndeu gou menh ma ranz aeu duz meuz raiz daeuj boiz. "

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Caiczawj naeuz: “ Aeu duż meuz raiz daeuj boiz?. Hw! Gangj ndaej baenz heih, mwngz cam saeyez yawj, duż gou dwg meuz maz?”

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Saeyez swnh gangj: “ Duz de dwg meuz bauj, ninz baenz lungz, naengh baenz guk, vunz gaenq hawj roek bak roek liengx ngaenz gvaq, lauxyez cungj mbouj sij ndaej gai. Seizneix mwngz couh ciuq gij gyaq neix dawz cienz daeuj.”

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daegfwnz caen souh ien’uengj lai lo. Ranz de song vunz itcig baengh gai fwnz gvaq saedceij, gaej gangj roek bak roek liengx ngaenz, couh dwg liengx roek cienz hix mbouj miz ha. Daegfwnz giuz dai giuz lix, hoeng, mbouj miz yungh. Caizcawj fatheiq digdig, fok naeuz: “ Gou mbouj caeuq mwngz gangj baenz lai, mbouj miz ngaenz couh aeu mehyah mwngz daeuj dingj. ” Gangj sat doq heuh saeyez dawz mbaw heiq senqsi® sij ndei haenx. doeg hawj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: mbouj gwn, vah mbouj gangj. Yah de raen le, cam de miz bingh roxnaeuz miz gijmaz saeh? De baenqbaenq gyaeuj, cungj mbouj wngq saek gawq. Dahgyoij cam bae cam dauq, Daegfwnz raen muenz mbouj ndaej lo, couh dawz gienh saeh neix lwnh hawj yah de nyi. Dahgyoij dingq le, couh gangj: “Gijmaz meuz bauj mbouj meuz bauj, mingzmingz haih raeuz, mwngz gaej lau, raeuz siengj banhfap doiqfouq de.” Doeklaeng, Dahgyoij siengj ok aen banhfap he. couh heuh Daegfwnz dawz aen gyoux he roq dek le, caiq aeu giengh nem boiz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: youh dawz aen banhfap doiqdaih caizcawj neix naeuz vunzlai nyi, hawj caezgya ndei guh doiqcingq ® .

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daengz ngoenz daihsam, Dahgyoij heuh Daegfwnz haep dou, caiq dawz aen lwggyoux vaih venj hwnj gwnz dou bae. Gvaq yaep he, caiczawj daiq bang mageq daeujdaengz bakdou Daegfwnz, heuh mbouj miz vunz han, hoznyaek raixcaix, couh fwgz nyoengx din daeb. Mbat daeb faq dou haingat, aen lwggyoux doek roengzdaeuj sanqbyax. Vunzlai dingqnyi couh doxcaez buet daeuj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyoij doiq caiczawj cangj: “ Mwngz mbouj raek da daeuj ha? Vihmaz dik vaih aen lwggyoux bauj gou. Wnggai baenzlawz guh ne?”

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq heuz goengq bya bouxdauh lienh siendan haenx, miz aen mbanj he, ndaw mbanj miz goeng caizcawj ndeu, sim ceiq doegsieb, gij reihnaz ndaw mbanj cungj deng de ciemq aeu liux, de cienmonz baengh nazmyangx bok gwn bouxhoj. Seizneix mbwnrengx, de baengh miz cienz miz seiq swnh doengh bineix mbwn rengx ep bouxhoj ndaw mbanj byaij geij cib leix roen bae Dah Sihgyangh rap raemx hawj ranz de gwn sawj. Danghaeuz bouxlawz mbouj bae, de couh sou naz ma mbouj hawj ndaem, bouxhoj mbouj miz banhfap, nyaenx heiq haenqrengz sij dai bae Dah Sihgyangh rap raemx hawj de. Gyoengq bouxhoj byongh hwnz couh hwnq congz bae, daengngoenz doek cij ma daengz ranz, do-engxngoenz ndit ndat. yanyan, hanh conh lumj fwn, dw-grengz yaek dai. Gyoengqvunz rap ha, rap ha, rap ngoenz doek ngoenz, raemx Dah Sihgyangh yaek hawq lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gangj daeuj caemh geizheih, cingq youq mwhneix, bouxdauh lienh ok siendan, ndaej baenz sien lo, ngoenz zdeu de roengz bya daeuj youz, raen gyoengq bouxhoj boux gaen boux bae rap raemx, caen dwgrengz, de gietsim mbouj dingq gwnzmbwn anbaiz, ciuq swhgeij gangj gvaq bae guh, gouq gyoengq bouxhoj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 、Sawcuengh dwg yungh lahdingh swmuj guh swmuj hingzsik, yungh vahcuengh fangh-yenz baihbaek guh goekdaej, aeu yaem vah-cuengh Vujmingz guh byauhcunj. Sawcuengh gungh miz 26 aen cihmeh, ndaw haenx seiq cih yungh daeuj guh diuhhauh, vihliux fuengbienh sonhag, mbouj cuengq de haeuj ndaw biuj bae.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 、Sawcuengh miz 22 cih singmeh, 108 cih yinhmeh. Ndaw yinhmeh faen miz roek cih yinhmehdan, cib nedeh cih yinhmeh yenz-yinhsueng, sam cib cih yinhmeh yaemndaeng m、n、ng guh rieng , loeg cib cih yinhmeh singsaek p、t、k guh rieng dwg cuj singsang, b、d、g guh rieng dwg cuj singdaemq .

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Sawcuengh miz bet aen singdiuh, ndaw de miz roek aen diuhsingdoeng, song aen diuhsingsaek. Moix aen yinhmehdoeng cungj miz roek aen yaem sang daemq mbouj doengz. Yaem sang lumj cih "na" , couh dwg daih'it diuh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daih'it diuh mbouj sij diuhhauh, daihngeih、sam、seiq、 haj、roek doengh aen diuh neix cungi aeu sii. Seizneix

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Vih bang Bouxcuengh ginzcung caeuq ganbu hag sawcuengh, Gvangjsih Bouxcuengh Swcigih Saujsu Minzcuz Yijyenz Vwnzsw Gunghcoz Veijyenzvei caeuq Gvangjsih Yin-zminz Gvangjbo Dendaiz hab banh «Sawcuengh Gyangjco». Bonjsawneix couh dwg «Sawcuengh Gyangjco» bonj daih'it, hawj boux dingq gvangjbo doiqciuq hag. Aenvih dou sawcuengh suijbingz mbouj sang, gizlawz ca caeuq mbouj deng, muengh caezgya daez yigen.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 《Dwng Siujbingz Vwnzsenj 1938—1965 Nienz 》youq 1989 nienz okbanj. Seizneix ginggvaq bouxsij doengzeiq, okbanj daih-ngeih banj, gaij heuhguh《Dwng Siujbingz Vwnzsenj》daih'it gienj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gienj neix daihngeih banj dembouj le 4 bien cucoz, cujyau dwg gij vah bouxsij youq dang Cunghgung Cunghyangh cungjsuhgi geizgan gangj. Daengx bonj saw gungh souhaeuj 43 bien cucoz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihngeih banj doiq ndaw faenzcieng lengq cih saw、lengq aen byauhdenj guh le gaijcingq, caemhcaiq dembouj le di cawqmingz moq ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cunghgung Cunghyangh Vwnzyen Benhciz Veijyenzvei 1994 nienz 7 nyied

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bonj vwnzsenj neix, sou haeuj le Dwng Siujbingz dungzci youq 1938 nienz daengz 1965 nienz duenh seizgan neix gij faenzcieng, gangjvah youqgaenj haenx, gungh 39 bien. Dingzlai dwg doengh-baez caengz fatbiuj gvaq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dwng Siujbingz dungzci doengh gij cucoz neix, ciczungh le de youq gaxgonq "Vwnzva Dagwzming" gij faenzcieng, gangjvah youqgaenj haenx, fanjyingj le youq Gangyiz Cancwngh, Gaijfang Cancwngh, laeb guek gvaqlaeng 17 bi geij aen lizsij seizgeiz neix, de doiq ginhsw, cwngci, ginghci, aen dangj gensez daengj fuengmienh guh ok gij gungyen haenx. De doengh gij swhsiengj, liljun neix, dwg Mauzcwzdunghswhsiengj ndawde aen gapbaenz bouhfaenh ndeu, doiq yozsiz yenzgiu gij lizsij dangj raeuz miz yiyi youqgaenj, daegbied dwg ndawde mbangj di swhsiengj gig miz cangcausing, doiq gij seveicujyi gensez caeuq gaigwz guek raeuz zeizneix cingq caih guh haenx, yaek miz cegen cozyung youqgaenj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bien bonj saw neix seiz, doiq mbangj vwnzgauj gaijcingq le siujliengh sawcih caeuq saehsaed, doiq gangjvah giluzgauj cix cingj-leix sawcih. Sojmiz vwnzgauj youz bouxsij bonjvunz saemjdingh gvaq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cunghgung Cunghyangh Vwnzyen Benhciz Veijyenzvei 1989 nienz 1 nyied

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: DUNGYENZ SINHBINGH CAEUQ SINHBINGH CWNGCI GUNGHCOZ

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen cangiz seizneix, dwg cawqyouq mwh mbangj giz camhseiz saetleih, nyengh mbouj dwg gang Yiz swvei cancwngh deng cienz-buenz saetbaih. Hoenx daengz doek sat saw roxnaeuz hingz, aeu youq ndaw dingjnanz gangcan bae gaijgez.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij cancwngh seizneix, yauhgiuz raeuz cungfaen yinhyungh gij ginghyen dijbauj buenqbi gangcan neix. Mboujdan wngdang yenz-giu canloz cansuz, caiq lij wnggai yungh goengrengz ceiqdaih, leih-yungh sojmiz gojnwngz, dungyenz guengjdaih minzcung gyahaeuj ginhdui, dem bouj gij binghdonz yienhmiz haenx, cujicz bingdoih moq, comzrom caeuq gyadaih guekgya vujcangh lizlieng, yawh-bienh cihciz aen cancwngh ciengzgeiz ganhoj haenx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mbouj miz maz ngeizvaeg, gij lwglan Cunghvaz minzcuc, dwg aeu ndwn youq ceiq baihnaj caeuq gyoengqcaeg Yizbwnj buek-mingh, gyoengqde dwg sijndaej diuz mingh swhgeij, vuenh aeu minzcuc gaijfang. Hoeng neix cix mbouj dwg naeuz gij gunghcoz dungyenz sinhbingh raeuz, mbouj miz saek di gunnanz. Daih'it dwg aenvih youq gwnz lizsij cungj conzdungi gvanhnen "lwg gvai mbouj dangbing" neix raeuz caengz ndaej daihlig bae haekfug

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daihngeh, dwg aenvih doenghbaez mbouj doiq vunzlai guh minzcuc gyauyuz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: • Bien faenzcieng neix dwg daengh youq 1938 nienz 2 nyied 12 hauh ndaw Cenzsen couhganh daihsam, seiq geiz hozganh youz Gozminz Gwzmingginh Daih 18 Cizdonzginh Cungjcwngeibu okbanj haenx. Dwng Siujbingz dungzci sij bien faenzcieng neix seiz nyaemh Bazluginh Cwngcibu fucujyin. Mbouj geij nanz, diuhnyaemh 129 swh cwngci veijyenz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daegbied dwg gang Yiz gyauyuz, engq daengz gangcan baeufaz le, hangh hong hungnaek neix, ciuqgaeuq guh ndaej gig mbouj gaeuq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daihsam, dwg aenvih ngoenzneix gij ciubing fuengsik raeuz seizneix soj hengz, lij miz cungj loekcak apik haenx, cungj loekcak neix laebdaeb saedhengz roengzbaev, dungyenz sinhbingh gunnanz gig daih, caiqlix sawj doengh boux ngamq dangbing haenx giepnoix gij eiqceiq giendingh caeuq hoenxcienqg damjliengh, miz seiz lij aiq cauhbaenz minzcung caeuq cwngfuj, ginhdui dox doiqdingj, hawj gij caeg Yizbwnj caeuq gyoengq hangenh miz vahgyaij caeuq gihvei

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daihseiq, hix aenvih doiq gij gunnanz gyoengq gang Yiz ginhyinz gyahsuz, mbouj cietsaed saedhengz gij youhdai banhfap cwingfuj fatboux haenx, ceiqdaemq hanhdoh bang gyoengqde gaigzez, sawj cenzsen cansw mbouj gvaqniemh ndaw ranz bae ansim hoenxcienqg, caemhcaig yungh cungj yingiyangj neix bae daezsang gij gietsim caeuq damjliengh gyoengq minzcung gya haeuj ginhdui.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danghnaez raeuz dinghsim dauqngeix gij ciubing ginghyen geij ndwen neix, raeuz couh yawj daengz raen youq mbangj digih, cingq aenvih miz gij gezdenj caeuq loekcak gwnzneix soj gangj, sawj gyoengq minzcung mbouj ndaej cungfaen rox daengz guekgya gaenq daengz mwh lix roxnaeuz dai, raeg roxnaeuz swnj neix, yungh gij ceiq haemz haenq minzcuz, buet bae gang Yiz cenzen, dauqfanj aiq canjseng caeuq gyadaih gij simleix nodj mbouj dang bing. Cungj gezgoj neix, yaek sawj minzcung mbouj ndaej cungfaen roxdaengz aen fuengcim cwgfuj romcomz caeuq gyadaih gozfangz ligliengh, yawhbienh ceng'aeu doeksat dwkhingz vunzdig dwg miz geijlai youqgaenj, dauqfanj youq bouhfaenh yinzmioz ndawde demgya gij simcingz doiq cwgfuj mbouj muenx. Cungj gezgoj neix, yaek sawj minzcung mbouj ndaej cungfaen rox daengz gyoengq guen bing cenzsen ganhoj buekmingh caeuq guek doengz gya miz gijmaz gvanhaeh, haenqhemj bae yungjhu caeuq naihcam ginhdui, saedyienh dagwzming 1 seizdaih cungj conzdungj ndei ginhminz caezsim haenx, bae ceng'aeu gangcan ndaej doeksat hoenxhingz, dauqfanj demgya bouhfaenh minzcung gij gvanhnen yiemqmbwq ginhdui caeuq mobuj nyienh dangbing. Caeg Yizbwnj, hangenh, Dozbai 2 bang neix, couh engq leihyungh gij gezdenj caeuq loekcak neix, bae guh gij yaemmaeuz yukyon, dajsuenq cauhbaenz minzcung bienq-sim, yungh neix daeuj haephangz caeuq nyauxluenh gang Yiz hou-fangh. Gij yienhsiengq youqgaenj neix, couhcinj dwg youq saek

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mbouj loek, gij hong ciu bing diuh bing gunghcoz duenh sei-zgan neix, gaenq ndaej cingzcik maqhuz daih, cenzsen ginhdui itbuen cungj ndaej daengz habdangq dembouj, hoeng neix nyengh mbouj ndaej bienqbaenz cungj baengzgawq ndeu, nyinhnaeuz raeuz lij ndaej laebdaeb yungh gij ciu bing diuh bing fuengsik mbouj ndei haenx. Couhcinj de ndaej gunghawj dembouj saek seiz, hoeng de baenzbaenz cungj mbouj ndaej muenxcuk gij sihyau ciengzgeiz gang-can. Cijmiz niujcingq doengh gij fuengsik mbouj dojdangq haenx, cijndaej baujcwng aen dungyenz yinvu baezlaeng ndaej saedyienh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raeuz ceijok aenvih ciu bing diuh bing fuengsik mbouj hab-dangq, cix aiq seng'ok gij gezgoj caeuq yingjyangj mbouj ndei, gij yiyi de mbouj dwg youq siuhgiz bae bihbingz, cix dwg youq baenz-lawz bae niujcingq, yungh gij dungyenz fuengsik ndei haenx, sawj cenzsen ndaej mbouj dingz mboujduenh dembouj, engq ndaej cujciz gij ginhdui moq soqlieng cukgaeuq haenx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Itdingh aeu rox daengz, daengx guek minzcung doiq bing Yiz-bwnj daeuj ciemq dwg baemz daengz ndokngviz bae, cijaeu raeuz ndaej yungh gij fuengsik haemq ndei, bae gienqnaeuz gyoengqde, gujdung gyoengqde, couh itdingh ndaej gig vaiq siucawz bouhfaenh minzcung ndawde gij simleix mbouj gengangh haenx, itdingh ndaej nyoengxhwnj gij gietsim caeuq mbeidamj ceiqhung gyoengqde, gag buet daengz cenzsen bae, gujji gij gvan lwg beix nuengx swhgeij hwnj cenzsen bae, vih minzcuz gaijfang aen saehnieb miznaj neix bae hoenxciengq. Neix daj gij laeh youq mbangj dieg guh dungyenz gunghcoz aeu ndaej cingzcik yienhda ndawde, ndaej cungfaen cwngmingz okdaeuj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij dieg dungyenz guh ndaej haemq ndei neix, vih raeuz yienh'ok le saek di ginghnen dijbauj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq gizhaenx, senhconz gujdung gunghcoz guh ndaej cung-faen. Yungh le gak cungj senhconz vujgi —— yienj heiq,、ciengq-go、ciengzbauq、ginzcung daihhoih、siujhingz feihhingz yenjgyangj、dandog gangj-goj daengjdaengj fuengfap, yiengq ginzcung gangj-mingz gij hingzsi caeuq sengloh dangqnaj, gietbyoengq gij doegsieb vunzdig. Ginggvaq gvangqlangh haeuj laeg bae senhconz, gij gang

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1. Aen Sizciz samsamceiq Cwnggenz Dwg Minzcuj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen yenzcw gang Yiz minzcuj cwnggenz samsamceiq 3 , dwg dangj cunghyangh raeuz daezok aen cwngczw caensaed haenx, gaenq ndaej daengz guengjdaih ginzcung yungjhu, daengx dangj dungzci daegbied wngdang ciuqhengz. Aenvih cungj cwnggenz neix biujyienh baenz geij aen gwzming gaihgiz doiq gyoengq hangenh, gyoengq vunz caengaenh Yizbwnj, gyoengq farjdungbai hengz lienzhab conhcwng, geiq ndaej caeuq hab dungjiyz cansen yenzcw, donzgez daih dingzlai vunz bae caeuq caeg Yizbwnj, hangenh, gyoengq vunz caengaenh Yizbwnj, fanjdung bai guh doucwngh, youh ndaej baujcwng gij youhsi youz gungcanjdangjyzcaeuq cinbu seiqlig giethab hwnjdaejj haenx, ndigah neix mboujdan dwg seizneix dizhou gangcan cungj cwnggenz hingzsik ceiq ndei ndeu, hix caiq dwg cungj cwnggenz hingzsik daengzcoh sinhminzcujcujyi gunghozgoz wngdang caiyungh haenx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij ciengzsaeq neiyungz samsamceiq cwnggenz dwg gijmaz ne?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daih'it, youq cujicz hingzsik gwnzde, mboujlwnh hingzcwng gihgvanh roxnaeuz minzyi gihgvanh, gungcanjdangjyenz cij ciemq sam faenh cih it roxnaeuz noix gvaq sam faen cih it, cinbu seiqlig ciemq sam faenh cih it, cungqgyang seiqlig ciemq sam faenh cib it. Youq minzyi gihgvanh ndawde, lij ndaej supsou siujsoq youbai fwn-swj camgya. Doengzseiz aenvih cunh dwg aen giekdaej cwnggenz,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: • Bien faenzcieng neix daeng youq 1941 nienz 4 nyied 15 hauh Dangj Dih Swnghhoz daih 35 geiz youz Cunghgung Cunghyangh Bwzfanghgiz okbanj haenx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: dieb raemxraiz, daeuj daengz henz mboqraemx. Gou dinghdingh nduw youq gizhaenx yawj de. Aen mboq neix, gvangq cib geij mij, raemx caemrwkrwk, sawdikdik, raemx mboq lae roengz mieng yiengjese, lunj sing fwen daj gizgyae cienz daeuj, geijlai ndeidingq ha! Ndaw raemx ingj miz byasang goliux goraeu gogyoij, lumjbaenz fuk dozveh gyaundei ndeu. Vunz youq henz mboq, couh lumj byaij haeuj ndaw dozveh nei, mok youq henz mboq biu bae biu dauq, vunz hix lumj yaek mbin hwnj-daeuj nei. Raq rumz ndeu ci daeuj, gwnz mboq fan hwnj gvaengzgvaengz raemxlangh, gaen dwk youh ciemhciemh sanq bae, ndaw sim gou fan-goenj mbouj caem. Gou fwt youh dauqngeix daengz gij cingzgingj vuenyungz seiznyaeq……

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mwh lij iq, gyoengq nyezdoih dou couh youq henz mboq dwk raemz guhcaemz, miz seiz maeuq youq henz mboq yawj biengzbeih yaeg raemx, yawj mbungqmbaj vad fwed diuq foux. Byalwg youq ndaw mboq yaep yat ok gwnz raemx, yaep youz bae gyaegyae. Yawj daengz gij cingzgingj maez vunz neix, dou cungj bek fwngz riugakgak. Miz seiz daihgya mbaet aeu foed aeu va, guh baenz aengvaengz daenj gwnzgaeuj, gag boux gag daengz henz mboq bae ciuq “gingq”, lij doxdaeuq mbwnj bak nyaeuq naj, cib- faen ndeiriu. Haemhnaengz miz ronghndwen, bouxhung bouxlaux daenj henz mboq saeg buh swiq byaek, dou hix ciengzseiz gaen bae, youq henz mboq guhndoj, dingq daxbuz gangj goj yahvaiz. Bouxlaux baema le, dou couh gag youq henz mboq muengh ronghndwen gwnzmbwn ciengq go, fwngz geq ndaundeiq yaepmyepmyep haenx nam damzraih. Seizhah, ndaw mboq duzgoep duzgvej raez ngobngaeb ngobngaeb, henz mboq engqgya nauhyied. Angq baeg angq mbwq le, dou couh mbouj rox mbouj nyinh youq henz mboq ninz ndaek lo, haujlai haemh cungj dwg bouxlaux bae ra raen umj ma ranz, seizhaenx, yienznaeuz ninz ndaek, gwnz naj cix lij riu nyumj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Doeklaeng dou ciemh ngoenz ciemh maj hung, couh haeuj hagdangz doegsaw lo. Yaepyet geij bi gvaqbae, gou beij gaxgonq lai roxsoq, hix haq ndaej haujlai saw lo. Haemhnaengz gwn caeuz sat le, gou lij bae daengz henz mboq caemx ndang youz raemx, youhcaiq aeu saw daeuj cuengq sing angq doeg……

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Seizhah miz haemh ndeu, mbwn yaek fuemx, ronghndwen lij mbouj caengz ok, gwnz mbwn angjlamz angjlamz. Gou daeuj daengz henz mboq, haep saw hwnjdaeuj, boih hot sei Dangzciuz ndeu: “Ndai reih daengz banringz, hanh ndik rim lajnamh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: byawz rox ngaiz ndaw vanj, naednaed hanh giet baenz.” Seizhaenx lauxsae gou laeglemx daeujdaengz henz ndang, dingq gou boih sei sat le, rubrub gyaeuj gou, naeuz: “Baenzneix yunghgoeng, ndei ha! Gij maqmuengh mbanjranz couh youq gwnz ndang sou lo!” Dingq lauxsae coenz vah neix, sim gou ndatfwk, daengx ndang rim rengz, mbanjranz maqmuengh gou, gou itdingh mbouj hawj mbanjranz vutnaj, gou amqamq roengz gietsim……

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lauxsae lumj yawj ok ndaw sim gou nei, ngaekngaek gyaeuj yawj gou, youh naeuz: “Yienznaeuz aen mboq mbouj lumj daihhaij gvangqlangh fouz bien, hoeng de hwnzhwnz ngoenzngoenz raemx lae mbouj dingz, seizseiz sawseuq ronghsag, ciuhciuh daihdaih gung vunz ndaw bya hungmaj, hawj vunz ndaw bya vandiemz. Guh vunz couh wng-dang lumj aen mboq neix ityiengh, hawj mbanjranz daiq daeuj maq-muengh, ndaej daengz vandiemz.” Daj seizhaenx hwnj, gou couh aeu aen mboq neix dang guh aen’gingq ndeu, cuengq haeuj ndaw sim bae, ciuq rongh gou doegsaw, ciuqrongh gou baenzvunz, ciuq rongh gou baenaj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzneix gou yaek daiq aen maqmuengh mbanjranz bae baihrog doegsaw lo. Gou sim' angqfangfang daeuj daengz henz mboq, saeq sing mieng naeuz: " Mboq Raemxsaw ha, ngoenzlaeng gou itdingh aeu lumj mwngz ityiengh, aeu lwedhanh gou dang raemxmboq, lailai hawj vunz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2. Bouxlawz uet dou la ? Siuj Vangz. Bouxlawz uet cueng la ? Gou. Bouxlawz sauq ranz la ? Siuj Veiz. Gou guh gijmaz la ? Mwngz cingjleix aencongz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 3. Mwngz swiq fwngz lwi? Mbouj swiq. Mwngz swiq naj lwi? Mbouj swiq. Mwngz yaek guh gijmaz la ? Gou yaek swiq gyaeuj. Mwngz yaek guh gijmaz? Gou yaek cat heuj.
