text: 2. ： Gonjganghbit youq gwnz daiz Gonjyienzbit youq gwnz daiz Gonjyienzbit youq ndaw daehbuh Bonjsaw youq ndaw daehsaw Diuzsoujbaq youq ndaw batnaj Gaiqcatheuj youq ndaw goujcungh Doiqhaiz youq laj congz Aenbatnaj youq laj congz Aen'daengq youq laj daiz Gonjganghbit youq laeng gou Bonjsaw youq laeng mwngz Aen'daehsaw youq laeng de

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bonjsaw youq gwnz congz Gonjganghbit youq gwnz congz Diuzsoujbaq youq ndaw daehvaq Gonjganghbit youq ndaw daehbuh Aendaehsaw youq ndaw fuengz Gaiqyanghsau youq ndaw batnaj De youq ndaw ranz De youq ndaw gyausiz Siuj Vangz youq ndaw duzsuhgvanj Gonjyienzbit mwngz youq laeng gou Diuzbuh de youq laeng mwngz Doiqhaiz gou youq laeng de

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahbengz bae gwn ngaiz, gwn sat le sujsak doumonz couh bae lo

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyax aeu fwingz menhmenh genj, genj baenz haujlai nanz, cij genj ndaej didi ndeu, yienghneix genj, genj baenz ngoenz cungj genj mbouj liux, lij yienghlawz bae gwn laeuj ndaej? Dahgyax doq ngeix doq siengsim dwk yaek daej. Seiz haenx, miz duz roegga ndeu mbin gvaq gwnz gyaeuj de, heuh sing gaga, lumj heuh baenz: "Ga ga, ndoengj baih laj, raeng baihgwnz, ruzrihraz, ruzrihraz dwk ha gyax!" Dahgyax ciuq yiengh daeuj raeng, lwgraz doq doek reongz aenndoengj baihlaj bae, duh henj cix gag lw youq gwnz raeng, yaep ndeu couh raeng ndaej lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyax genj duh sat le, sim soeng haujlai, hoeng neix daengz bonjfaenh mbouj miz saek diuz buhmoq, baenzlawz miznaj bae gwn laeuj? Dahgyax simgaenj dwk daej lo. Duz roegga haenx youh mbin gvaq gwnz gyaeuj de, heuh singgaga, lumj hemq baenz: "Ga ga, buh gyax laj go maenj, soujbaq laj go' dauz." Dahgyax dingqnyi le doq buet bae laj go maenj go' dauz ra, caen miz dauq buh moq caeuq mbawsoujbaq ndeu moek youq laj de. Dahgyax daenj le couh angqfwngfwng bae gwn laeuj lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyax lau ganj mbouj gib, youq gwnz roen buet dwk vaiqvivi, lienz mbawsoujbaq haenx doek lo cix mbouj rox. Seizhaenx, miz boux hauxseng doegsaw ndeu bae gingsingz wngqgauj, raen mbawsoujbaq youq gyang reon neix, couh gip hwnj daeuj. De raen gij va gwnz soujbaq siuq ndaej gyaeu baenzneix, bak haenh mbouj dingz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Seiz Dahgyax yietbaeg, mbon ndaw daeh mbouj raen mbawsoujbaq, doq doxdauq ndij roen ma ra. Dahgyax byaij daengz buenq roen, raen boux hauxseng haenx, couh cam de raen mbouj raen saek mbaw soujbaq doek gwnz roen. "Raen ha, gou ha h nyaeb ndaej mbaw ndeu." Bouxdoegsaw doq gangj doq daj ndaw daeh aeu mbaw soujbaq haenx ok daeuj hawj Dahgyax, lij haenh naeuz: "Gij dinfwngz mwngz caen ak lo, siuq ndaej gyaeu baenz neix." Dahgyax caeuq bouxdoegsaw roxnaj le

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gangj yaep goj ndeu, mbouj geij nanz, raen dawzbanj lai, song de couh doxgyaez lo. Mwh yaek doxbiek, Dahgyax couh aeu mbaw soujbaq haenx soengq hawj bouxdoegsaw lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gvaq ndaej geij bi, Dahgyax gaenq ndaej cib bet bi, Dahbengz hix ndaej cib seiq bi lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Miz ngoenz ndeu, boux bing ndeu gwih max dwk daeuj ranz Dah-gyax, doiq mehlaeng Dahgyax naeuz: "Gung'heij, gung'heij, ngoenz laeng Bouxcangyenz yaek daeuj ciep Dahgyax lo. Bouxcangyenz baij gou daeuj daengq sou nyi gonq, sou yaek bwh ndei bw." laixlawz Bouxdoeg-saw haenx bae gauj ndaej cangyenz lo. Mehlaeng rox gij saeh Dahgyax caeuq Bouxcangyenz doxgyaez neix le cungj da'nding dangqmaz, ndaw sim naemj: "Dahgyax siengj bae guh yah Bouxcangyenz? Hw, gaej siengj ndaej ndei baenzlai!" Vih mbouj hawj Dahgyax gvaq ndaej saedceij ndei, mehlaeng siengj aen banhfap doegsieb ndeu okdaeuj lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenz daihngeih gyanghaet, mehlaeng doiq Dahgyax naeuz mbouj miz byaekmou lo, hawj de bae ra di byaekmou ma guh mokcaeuz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyax han lecouh aeu aen swx ndeu ok bae lo. De raen henz daemz miz byaek lai, couh bae henz daemz aeu. Mwh de cingq goemz gyaeuj aeu byaekmou, mehlaeng caegcaeg yaemj din daengz baihlaeng de, yungh rengz baez nyoengx, Dahgyax couh doek roengz ndaw daemz bae lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dahgyax doek daemz le, mehlaneg couh lox Dahbengz, hawj de bae haq hawj Bouxcangyenz. Hoeng Dahbengz dai lix mbouj guh. Mehlaeng sim mbouj dai, youh aeu ngaenz bae cingj mehsien ndeu daeuj lox Dah-bengz. Mehsien daeuj le, youq ndaw ranz cang fangz guh gvaiq diemj ieng dwk ciengq naeuz: "Dahgyax mingh raemx, Dahbengz mingh feiz. Feiz caeuq raemx mbouj ndaej caemh youq, miz feiz couh mbouj miz raemx, miz raemx couh mbouj miz feiz."

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: cawx yawj ngawh mbaw mou yiuj bawh dawz liuz coux youq nyouh rouh ndaw siuq diuz liux ngou louh boux dawh gawh gauj mae cam yamq nyaemh ngamq mbamj famh namh vamz laemx daemj gaemh daemz nyaemq coemj mboenj cimh liemz bamj ndaemq diemz gemj loemq canj nganx mbanj lan hanh ganj maenh baenz faen gaenh nyaen ndaenj daenj cienz bienq nienj lienh linx nyinh ninz din luenz buenq suen vunz lwenz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: anj. Namzningz, mwngz lij miz caencik maz mbangj?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Liengz: Miz haujlai boux, aenvih daxdaiq gou vunz Namzningz. Lumj daxgoux daxgimx daxheiz bohheiz caeuq gij lwgnyez gyoengqde.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Vangz: Ox, miz baenzlai caencik youq Namzningz, gvaiq mbouj ndaej ngoenz singhgiz ciengzseiz raen mwngz haeuj singz bae.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Liengz: Dwg lo, gyoengq nuengx gou baez daengz singhgiz haj couh iu bae guhcaemz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Vangz: Daxdaiq daxda mwngz ndangdaej baenzlawzyiengh?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Liengz: Daxda gou bi' gvaq gaenq gvaqseiq lo. Daxdai gou ndang-daej lij cangq, da mbouj mong rwz cix mbouj nuk, hoeng heuj vaemx lo. Gij caencik mwngz ne lij miz bouxlawz mbangj?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Vangz: Miz gouxhung goux'iq song ranz, cungj youq gwnz yienh-singz, daxmeh gou baenz dahlwghung.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Liengz: Ox, raeuz cungj miz haujlai caencik beixnuengx, bi'naengz gvaq ciet cungj ma ranz doxcomz, baenz ranz cungj nauhnyied raixcaix.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gvangjsih Bouxcuengh Swcigih youq guek raeuz baihnamz. Daengx gih miz neeih cib sam fanh bingzfueng goengleix gvangq, sam cien caet bak lai fanh vunz, miz Bouxcuengh, Hancuz, Yauzcuz, Myauzcuz, Dungcuz Mohlauj, Mauznanz, Veizcuz, Ginghcuz, Yizcuz, Suijcuz, Gwz-lauj dwngj cib neeih aen minzcuz, baen miz Nanzningz, Liujcouh, Gveilinz, Vuzcouh, Yilinz, Hozciz, Bwzswz, Ginhcouh bet aen digih, swcigih cig-ciep guenj dih miz Nanzningz, Liujcouh, Gveilinz, Vuzcouh caeuq Bwzhaij haj aen si, digih guenj dih si, yienh caeuq swciyen gungh miz caet cib haj aen. Nanzning Si dwg swcigih soujfuj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen haenx aen'daiz dwg lwi? Mbouj dwg. Aen'eij.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen haenx aen'gyausiz dwg lwi? Mbouj dwg. Aenfuengz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: b d n g l c am bam dam nam gam lam cam aem baem daem naem gaem laem caem om bom dom nom gom lom com oem boem doem noem goem loem coem em bem dem nem gem lem cem iem biem diem niem giem liem ciem im — dim nim gim lim cim uem buem duem nuem guem luem — um bum dum num gum lum cum

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: mb m ng ny y h an mban man ngan nyan yan han aen mbaen maen ngaen nyaen yaen haen on mbon mon ngon nyon yon hon oen mboen moen ngoen nyoen yoen hoen

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 4 Dahgyax aeu fwngz genj, genj baenz nanz, cij genj ndaej , yiengh neix genj, genj ngoenz cungj genj mbouj liux, lij bae gwn laeuj ? Dahgyax ngeix siengsim yaek daej. Seiz haenx, miz duz roegga ndeu gvaq gyaeuj de, heuh sing gaga, lumj heuh : "Ga, ga, ndoengj , raeng , ruzrihraz, ruzrira dwk ha gyax!" Dahgyax yiengh daeuj raeng, lwg raz doek reongz ndoengj , duhhenj cix lw youq gwnz raeng, couh genj ndaej lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 5 Seiz Dahgyax , ndaw daeh mbouj raen souj baq, doq doxdauq roen ma ra. Dahgyax daengz buenq roen, boux hauxseng haenx, couh de raen mbouj raen soujbaq doek gwnz roen. "Raen!" Bouxdoegsaw gangj daj ndaw daeh soujbaq okdaeuj hawj Dahgyax, lij naeuz: "Gij mwngz caen ak lo, siuq ndaej baenzneix." Mwh yaek , Dahgyax couh soujbaq hawj bouxdoegsaw lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 6 Ngoenz daihsam, Bouxcangyenz couh vunz giuh daeuj ciep lo. Bouxcangyenz daenj buhraez moq gwih max ，lij miz haujlai bing laeng, vifung . Bawxmoq daenj buhmoq vaqmoq, lij baengzhoengz gyaeuj . bawxmoq haeuj giuh naengh ndei, Gyoengq vunz couh lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 7 Giuh dingz le, Bouxcangyenz max , bae mbaw baengzhoengz gyaeuj bawxmoq , yawj, de dwk hemq naeuz: "Mwngz mbouj dwg Dahgyax!" Dahbengz byaij ok giuh daeuj, daej gangj ginggvaq dahcej de . Boux-cangyenz dingq daej yaek fatvangh, ceng di roengz daemz bae cimh Dahgyax.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 8 Bouxcangyenz dingq le couh ndek soujbaq roengz daemz bae . Seiz de, raen soujbaq deng duengh roengz bae,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cangh: Ranz rongh lo, hwnqdaeuj lo, Siuj Lij.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij: Daj lingz la? Gou caengz dingqnyi lingz yiengj ne.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cangh: Senqcix yiengj lo, mwngz ninz baenzlai ndaek, baeq dingqnyi ne. Mwngz yawj, daengngoenz gaenq hwnj sang lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij: Yu, caeklaiq mwngz heuh gou, mboujne, Gou lij caengz singj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cangh: Mwangz haemhlwenz geij diemjcung ninz?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cangh: Ninz gyang lai mbouj baenz, ninz mbouj gouq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij: Deng lo, seizneix roxnyinh miz di gyaeujngunh ne.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cangh: Mwngz haemhlwenz loqraen gijmaz lo, gangjvah baenz song baez, hoeng gangj gijmaz gou cix dingq mbouj ok lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij: Loqraen bohmeh gou daeuj yawj gou, gou roxnyinh simangq raxcaix.→ adv.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mbwn laep lo, daxboh lij youq ndaw naz uep duz gij-maz, gyanghwnz cij ma. Daegnuengx ninz mbouj ndaek, couh daj gwnz congz benz hwnj daeuj, yawj daxboh guh gij-maz. Gvaq yaep ndeu, de raen daxboh dawz geij duz goep dwk roengz aen gang iep byaek ndip haenx bae. Daegnuengx mbouj ndwet, caegcaeg ma daengz gwnz congz, de niep duz goep: duzgoep doiq vunz miz ik, mbouj ndaej gaeb duz daeuj gwn, wnggai langh duz bae……

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ranz rongh lo, daxboh okbae guh hong lo. Daegnuengx buet coh aen gang coux goep haenx, aeu song diuz faex nep duzgoep okdaeuj, youhcaiq baez duz baez duz gop roengz aen mbuep mbup ndeu bae, liuxle aeu cag gap ndei, couh dawz gyoengq goep de bae ndaw naz cuengh lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1. MCL classifier may lie lonely in front of a notional word for indicating classification of things. For example:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1 boux — indicating classification of mankind: boux vunz boux hek person guest a person a guest

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2 duz — indicating classification of animal: duz goep duz gaeq frog chicken a frog a chicken

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 3 go — indicating classification of plant: go ngaih go ngaeux mugwort lotus root a mugwort a lotus root

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 4 aen —— indicating classification of lifeless things: aen ranz aen ruz house boat a house a boat

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 5 gonj — indication classification of pen gonj bit pen a pen

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2. MCL classifier may integrate lonely with the inter-

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1. The MCL sentence with consecutive predicates is the some form as chinese, in which the first verb must not be a psychoverb or a modal one

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: the later one not a directional verb. And there is not any conjunction between two verbs. And two verbs may be related to the same subject. For example:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 1 Gou roengz mbanj bae to coengh vunz. subject first verb later herb

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2 De daj ndaw daeh de dawz di ien sei ndeu okdaeuj subject firstverb dwk youq laj din gou. later verb He took some cut tobaccos from his pocket and put them on my foot.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 2. "gwih ci" ride a bicycle from "Miz goeng'au gwih ci ndeu" is an after-attribute which modifies the noun "goeng'au" uncle . The sentence means that an uncle who

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daxboh yien cwz daengz naz lueg le, cuengq noegcae yaek cang ek, hoeng ek lumz youq ndaw ranz lo. Mbouj miz ek, baenzlawz dawzcae? Daxboh nyapnyuk raixcaix. Cingq youq seizneix, genbuh de deng duz gijmaz beng mbat ndeu, de baez yawj, dwg duzgaeng ndaw ranz —— duz he fwngz ndeu beng genbuh daxboh, fwngz ndeu gaem aen ek cwz ndeu. Daxboh raen le raemxda doek lo, caemh roxnyinh de ok bak dou seizhaenx, duzgaeng va genbuh de dwg daezsingj de —— de lumz dawz ek lo.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: “Caen ndei gyaez,” daxboh doiq duzgaeng naeuz: “Gou mbouj beg ciengx mwngz, mwngz baeg lwi? iek lwi? Bae dieg raemh youq, gou hawj mwngz gwn doxgaiq.” Daxboh gangj le daj daeh rog dawz song aen mak okdaeuj, uet gij gyuek gwnz mak bae, liuxle ndien hawj duzgaeng. Duz-gaeng coux gvaqbae, angqcoekcoek, buet daengz dieg raemh zdeu gwn hwnjdaeuj lo!

text: aeu raemx guh mingh, baenzlawz ndaej maj youq ndaw dieg! Byafeiz mbaw? Geiq hwnj Dangzciuz Bouxcanghsei Cwnz Swnh sij Byafeizmbaw: "Feiz fwj rim bya giet mbouj sanq, duzroeg cien leix mbouj gamj daeuj" "Ngux nyied bya feiz engqgya ndat, dingznding bak loh mbouj miz vunz". Gou youh youq ndaw sim gag neix: dauqdaej dwg vunz maz gamj ciengzgeiz swnghhoz youq dieg Byafeizmbaw neix ni?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yaep ndeu, daeuj daengz aen mbanj henz Byafeizmbaw, cijraen dieg neix heuswtswt, liengzsisi. Ax, dwg mbanj mak'it! Caiq haeujbae, dwg luegmak'it lo! Aen lueg neix mbouj miz geijlai laeg, ngiengx gyaeuj yawj, lij raen gwnz bya youh fwz youh ndoq, hoenzheu negeungeu, fwjmok swng bongh, lumj yaek cit mbwn. Hoeng, laj lueg neix, raemx saw riuz doengh, faex heu raemhrwd, mak'it rim lueg. Dingq naeuz, aen lueg neix namz baek raez bet goengleix, doeng sae gvangq buenq goengleix, gij gvangq naz mak'it roek cien lai moux, it bi swnghcanj mak'it singjsien roek bak lai fanh goenggaen. Youq daengx lajmbwn, mak'it dieg neix ceiq vandiemz. Youq henz roen, miz haujlai ranz cien, gij ranz cien neix, hix baenz aen gyaq mak'it, gwnz ranz, henz ciengz, gizgiz mak'it roix dem roix, lumj cien fanh roix caw ronghrigrig, ndongqndikndik, bouxboux haenh mbouj dingz bak.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq giz Luegmak'it, gyoengqdou haeuj daengz ndaw Lozyenz mak'it.Dieg neix roen iq vangraeh doxgaq, roen goz doeng lueg, mbaw mak'it cw mbwn, gizgiz baenz raemh, liengz sangj hab vunz. Gij engq geizheih dwg, miz diuz mieng ndeu lae gvaq laj aen gyaq mak'it, raemx lae fan foetfoet. A? Youq dieg "feiz" neix, daj gizlawz ok baenzlai raemx daeuj ni? Caezgya danq naeuz: "Raemx caeuq feiz doxbaengh"、“diegsa raemx lai ha!” Boux daujyouz raen gyoengqdou siengj mbouj doeng, couh gej naeuz: "Youq Sinhgyangh, bya'nae ndaej caeuq 'diegfeiz' doengz youq, diegsa ciengzseiz caeuq 'dieg rum heu' doxbaengh, caenhgvanj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: "Dou gunghawj dinfwingz, swzliu, caemhcaiq guhndei haujgyaq soudauq, baujcingq boux doxgap ndaej ngaenz, guhhaeanz bouxhoux ndaej hingz." Swconh Ginhveih Dajciengx Nungzminz Ciennieh Hozcozse bouxfuewz Linz Cinyuz naeuz. Ngaenzcienz faenboiq fuengmienh, dieggnek laebbaenz aen cidu faenboiq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ngaenzcienz cunh cizdij, ei okeienz lai noix faenhoengz, guhhung cunh cizdij ginghei souhaeuj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: caemhcaiq fat gaeqlwg hawj nungzhu hang ciengx, caiq haujgyaq soudauq, hawj nungzhu youq bakdou ranz couh ndaej leih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aenvih gozging cuengqgyaj, geiz hauqceij 2025 nienz 10 nyied 8 hauh mbouj ok lo, hoh gyoengq beixnuengx ngoenzciet angqyangz, youq ndei gwn van!

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 《Sawcuengh》 roek nienzgaep cekgwnz ciuq Gvangjsih Bouxcuengh Swcigih Gyauyuz-dingh《Sawcuengh Gocwngz Byauhcunj Sawqhengz 》 Gvei Gyau Minz Gyau 2012 11 hauh 、《Sawcuengh Sawgun Song Cungj Vahsaw Gyauyuz Ngeih Loih Mozsiz Saedhengz Banhfap》 Gvei Gyau Minz Gyau 2012 7 hauh daeuj biensij.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Govwnz bonj gobwnj neix dwg daj ndaw saw lajneix genj okdaeuj:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Docih doengh boux biensij geij bonj saw neix!

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Seizgan lumj raemx lae, Bongh bae vaiqvidvid, Yaepda daengz ndwencib, Gvaqbae gip dangqmaz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ndwencib ngoenz daihdaeuz, Guek raeuz ndaej caetroek, Daj laehguek heiij goek, Caetroek hophi daengz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzseng guekcoj raeuz, Wnggai aeu geiqmaenh, Raeuz miz gwn miz daenj, Geiqmaenh ngoenzseng de.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Laebguek caetroek bi, Miz angq miz danqheiq, Guekcoj miz ngoenzneix, Saedeaih mbouj yungzheih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gyoengqde lumj mabag, Rag vunz youh ciengj ngaenz, Dub bouq aen dem aen, Faen ngaenz dwk roengz daeh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mwhgonq Cungguek gaeuq, Vunz ukgyaeuj mbouj gvai, Gueklig doeklaeng lai, Ngaiz vunzrog daeuj haep.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bazgoz Lenzginh bing, Sien ginggvaq Denhcinh, Caiq hoenx haeuj Bwzgingh, Dawz cungq couh nyingz vunz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yizbwnj vunz ceiq doeg, Raen vunz couh moeh dai, Daengz couzyah vunzsai, Bae haujlai diuzmingh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raeuz daengx guek lwgminz, Gwn ninz youq mbouj onj, Vihliux ndang ndaej fonj, Gonq laeng daeuq mbouj dingz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daj laeb guek moq daeuj, Raeuz haeujsim gaijgwz, Guh saeh miz fucwz, Gaijgwz ndaej swnhleih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bouxguen caeuq heksingq, Caezsim gauj ginghei, Yied ngoenz yied bienq ndi ndei , Ginghei hoenghhwdhwd.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Guekcoj raeuz maenh'ak, Vunzyak haep mbouj you, Miz vunz daeuj hoenx raeuz, Aeu de dai roengz namh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ginghei gauj ndaej hwnj, Caiq hwnqguh gozfangz, Guekrengz ndaej daezsang, Gozfangz aeu maenh'ak.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mwngz yawj gwnz seiqgyaiq, Baih vunz luenhumhum, Mbouj gangj naeuz donqgwn, Dai hwnz lawz mbouj dingh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mwhneix youq lajmbwn, Haujlai vunz doxhaep, Lumj duzma doxhaeb, Aenmbwn laepnyamnyam.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Giz vunz cungj hoenxciengq, Mbiengj baihdoeng bingzan, Gyoengq Cungguek lwglan, Bingzan ciuh dam ciuh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ▲ Ciet gozging Nanzningz Si Minzczuz Dadau venj guekgeiz angqohh ngoenzseng guekcoj. Dangz Ginz ingj

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bí 1921, youq Cezgyangh Gyahhingh gwnz aen ruznding ndeu, Aen cwngdangj ndeu okseng lo, Bouxgaemdox "nohhenj" haidaeuz yinx "gwzming yinzminz", Daiqlingx gunghyinz, nungzminz, siuj swheanj gaihgiz caeuq minzouz swheanj gaihgiz, Lumj seiq naed ndaundeiq iq, hopndaet aen cungsim ndeu, Yungh lwednding, baihnaj cung baihlaeng guen, Nyumx nding gij namhndaem neix,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bí 1949 ndwen 10 ngoenz 1 hauh, mienh daih 'it Vujsingh Hungzgiz, Youq gwnz saenzcou daihdeih swnghwnj, De lumj aen daengngoenz ndeu, caenh gyaep, Gij mokfaenx gyuem youq gwnz dieg 960 fanh bingzfueng goengleix, 56 aen minzouz fwngz gaem fwngz, doengz ciengg aen go ndeu: 《Mboujmiz Gungcanjdangj, Couh Mboujmiz Cungguek Moq》, Doifan "sam goengq byahung", ciepeoux seizcin moq daeuj daengz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Seizneix, aen Cungguek hoenghfwdfwd ndeu, Aen Cungguek saekrim maqmuengh ndeu, Sangnengneng daengj youq baihdoeng seiqgyaiq, Seizneix, youq laj mbaw Vujsingh Hungzgiz yinxlingx, Cibseiq ik vunz Cungguek, gaem fwgz doxgap guh, Coh aen "loqsiengj Cungguek", Youq gwnz diuz roen hung neix haenqrengz baenaj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzneix, raeuz aeu coh mienh geiznding neix gingqlaex, Coh aen guekcoj hungmbwk raeuz gingglaex, Aenvih raeuz gig gyaez mwngz——guekcoj daxmeh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gyong yiengj dungdung doengh daengz bya, Daihgya eu fwen haenh guekcoj, Guekcoj couh lumj daengngoenz moq, Hoh de ngoenzngoenz rongh lwgminz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Haeuxlaeuj oemq youq ndaw cukdoengz, Feihrang doeng daengz singz Baekging, Gingz boi caez hoh ciet gozging, Singz mhanj cukhoh guekcoj maengh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goleux va hai nding lumj feiz, Laehcei va rang yinx rwi daeuj, Cienfanh dujva cungj ngaek gyaeuj, Guekcoj hwngvuengh raeuj simvunz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Haeuxnaengj ndaw caengq rangraegraeg, Nyumx baenz hajsaek ndei yawj lai, Cang vanj haeuxnaengj baij gwnz daiz, Saisai mbwkmbwk gingq guekcoj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Maknganx makgai rim gwnz go, Nohbiz feihrang diemz daengz sim, Soengq daengz gak dieg hawj vunz cimz, Guekeoj gyaudoeng caen rimhoz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yaek hawj ruzlungz bongh ndaej vaiq, Daihgya okrengz cung raemxlangh, Caezsim caezeiq daeuj doxbang, Guekcoj fazeanj vaiq youh ndei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lwggyoij henjrwg youq gwnz bo, Makgam gwnz go hoij lumj gim, Cwngewz dangj lumj fwn seizcin, Nyinh daengz Mbanjcuengh cienfanh ranz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Hawfwen vunz lai lumj raemxhaij, Bouxboux maij dingq sim hix van, Ronghndwen dingq le mbouj ma ranz, Haenhdanq guekcoj gizgiz ndei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gaeuvaiz vanvan ut dauqgwnz, Gyoengqvunz Mbanjcuengh ceiqheiq sang, Gizgiz guh saenqhwng lajmbanj, Ganq aeu guekcoj engq gyaeundei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzseng guekcoj geizsaek hiu, Mbanjcuengh singriu dauqcawq langh, Ndawsingz lajmbanj bouxboux angq. Caez hoh guekcoj fanhdaih hoengh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Fouxaennyenz dwg cungj foux ndaw-biengz saujsu minzcuz ndeu, mwh diuqfoux, gyoengqvunz caezcup diuqfoux. Guek raeuz Bouxcuengh、Yauzcuz、Myauzcuz daengj minzcuz cungj haengj diuq cungj foux neix. Gwnz dozveh Byaraiz caemh veh miz cungj doz goengcoj raeuz humx aennyenz angqyangz dwk diuqfoux.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gizneix cujyau gangj cungj fouxaennyenz hwng youq Hozciz ranghdieg Yauzcuz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Moix bi liggaeuq ngux nyied ngeihcib gouj, doengh boux Yauzcuz ranghdieg neix, cungj hwng gvaq aen Cietdaznuj, roq aennyenz, diuq fouxaennyenz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cungj ndeu youq ndaw ranz roq nyenz, vunz haemq noix. Youq gwnz daeuzloz ndaw ding baihswix baihgvaz venj nyenzboux, nyenzmeh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Doeg sug gij vahsug lajneix, caiq boih roengzdaeuj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 3. Ndaem gonq baenz haeux; Ndaem laeng baenz vaeng.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Doegsug hot fwen lajneix, caiq naemj-naemj yawj, dwg duz maz?

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: song aen neix, aenboux venj baihgvaz, aenmeh venj baihswix, bouxmbwk sien roq nyenzboux, bouxsai caiq roq nyenzmeh, yungh daeuj daejyienh daxmeh dwg boux daih'it, daxboh baiz daihngeh. Bouxlaux sien roq aennyenz sam baez guh cijveih, caiq daengz boux gizyawz baez boux baez boux roq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lingh cungj ndeu dwg youq rog ranz roq nyenz, vunz haemq lai youh nauhyied. Youq giz dieg gvangq, venj aennyenz youq gwnz faexsaux, aensoq gag dingh, roq fap caemh haemq lai: Song aen cuiz roq naj nyenz, dan aen cuiz roq ndang nyenz, song boux vunz ram nyenz roq, venj nyenz daeuj roq daengjdaengj. Seiz roq nyenz lij ciengz miz yinhoyz roxnaeuz ndaek gyong daeuj doxgap.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Deihfueng mbouj doengz, fouxaennyenz cix gag lingh. Miz cungj diuq fap daegbied ndeu dwg sam boux vunzmbwk caeuq boux vunzsai ndeu daeuj roq, song boux vunzmbwk

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq Dunghlanz Yen Vujcon Ci byongh bya Lahgyazsanh miz aen gamj nde heuhguh Gamjlezningz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gamjlezningz gig gvangqlangh, ndawd sang 43 mij, gvangq 64 mij, laeg 137 mij, Ngiengx gyaeuj yawj, bangxgamj bingzbw seuqsat

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: gwnz dingj haujlai rinndaksaw rinyagnywx venj dwk, lumj cienfanh a daeng vava loegloeg, Gamjlezningz lumj a lijdangz diendeih gag cauxbaenz nei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gamjlezningz yienzlaiz heuh Gamj- gae, gaxgonq lij hwnj miz Miuhgamj- gae. 1925 nienz,

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: DUNGYENZ SINHBINGH CAEUQ SINHBINGH CWNGCI GUNGHCZ …… 1 1938 nienz 1 nyied 12 hauh DANGJ CAEUQ GANG YIZ MINZCUJ CWNGGENZ …… 8 1941 nienz 4 nyied 15 hauh 129 SWH VWNZVA GUNGHCZ GIJ FUENGCIM YINVU CAEUQ GIJ ROENGZRENGZ FUENGYIENGQ DE …… 23 1941 nienz 5 nyied HOH LIUZ BWZCWNGZ DUNGZCI 50 BI LAUXSOUH …… 32 1942 nienz 12 nyied 15 hauh DAIHGAIQ CUNGJGEZ HAJ BI NEIX DAEUJ DOIQ VUNZDIG DOUCWNGH … 35 1943 nienz 1 nyied 26 hauh YOUQ DIZCANGIH BAENZLAWZ GUH CUJCIZ GUNGHCZ CAEUQ YINHYUNGH CWNGCWZ …… 48 1943 nienz 1 nyied 26 hauh GWNHGIDI GENSEZ CAEUQ GINZCUNG YINDUNG …… 69 1943 nienz 2 nyied 20 hauh GIJ GINGHCI GENSEZ DAIHANGZ GIH …… 83 1943 nienz 7 nyied 2 hauh AEN GANGJVAH YOUQ GWNZ BWZFANGHGIZ DANGJYAU CWNGJFUNGH DUNGYENZVEI GUH HAENX …… 93 1943 nienz 11 nyied 10 hauh LAEBHWNJ AEN DABEZSANH GWNHGIDI GAENJMAENH HAENX …… 102 1943 nienz 8 nyied 27 hauh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cwng heuh miz gak cungj gak yiengh, ciengz seiz yungh miz doengh gijneix:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daiq goeng, daiq buz, goeng, buz, lungz, baj, boh, meh, au, simj, gux, daeg go, beix sauj, daeg nuengx, dah cej, dah nuengx, boh da, meh daiq, daiq, goeng da, nax, meh nax, heiz, goeng heiz, au biuj, lwg, lan, laenj, vaihseng daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Lij miz caen cik, baengz youx, dungz ci, senh swngh, siuj cej, nij sw dem.

text: 10 Dwngz Hungzli, Linz Cinz. Gij Maeyw Diemjcit Ywfap Ywcuengh M . Baekging:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goekgaen Dwg baenz go golwgluengh doenghgo dagizgoh. Phyllanthus urinaria L.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Singqfeih Gunghyung Singq liengz, feih gam、haemz. Siuhuj gaijdoeg. Aeu daeuj yw ganhyenz、cangzyenz、sinyenz daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yunghfap Yunghliengh Cienq raemx gwn, 15 ~ 20 gwz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danyw Ciengzyungh Golwgluengh、go'iemgaeq、gocaetmbaw gak 15 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw ganhyenz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goekgaen Dwg baenz go cenhgwnhcauj doenghgo dagizgoh. Euphorbia thymifolia Linn.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Singqfeih Gunghyung Singq liengz, feih soemj, saep. Siuhuj doeng roenraemx, gaijdoeg siu foeg. Aeu daeuj yw oksiq, nyan daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yunghfap Yunghliengh Cienq raemx gwn, 20~50 gwz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danyw Ciengzyungh Go'gyakiq、byaekroem'oen、goriengroeggaeq gak 15 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw oksiq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goekgaen Dwg gij naengfaex dezdunghcingh doenghgo dunghcinghgoh. Ilex rotunda Thunb.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Singqfeih Gunghyung Singq hanz, feih haemz. Siuhuj gaijdoeg, siu foeg dingz in. Aeu daeuj yw baenzsa, conghhoz in, veicangzyenz, naengnoh fazyenz daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yunghfap Yunghliengh Cienq raemx gwn, 10~15 gwz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: rogyungh habliengh, cienq raemx swiq baihrog.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danyw Ciengzyungh ①Maexdeihmeij、ginhsenfungh gak 10 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw conghhoz in.

text: ②Maexdeihmeij 10 gwz, byaekroem'oen 30 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw cangzyenz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goekgaen Dwg baenz go fwnjyezlunzvanzdwngz doenghgo fangzgijgoh. Cyclea hypoglauca Schauer Diels.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Singqfeih Gunghyung Singq hanz, feih haemz. Siuhuj gaijdoeg. Aeu daeuj yw conghhoz foeg in daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yunghfap Yunghliengh Cienq raemx gwn, 5 ~ 10 gwz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danyw Ciengzyungh Ginhsenfungh、raghazranz gak 10 gwz, vagimngaenz、banjlanzgwnh gak 20 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw conghhoz in.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Goekgaen Dwg gaiq ganj gonoegnueg doenghgo denhnanzsinghgoh. Arisaema consanguineum Schott.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Singqfeih Gunghyung Singq miz di huj, feih haemz, manh, miz doeg. Sup dumz vaq myaiz, siu fung dingz inniuj, sanq giet siu foeg. Aeu daeuj yw myaizniugiet, ae, fatbagmou daengj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yunghfap Yunghliengh Cienq raemx gwn, 3~10 gwz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Danyw Ciengzyungh ①Cwdenhnanzsingh 9 gwz, fazbanya、naengmakgam、gosijsu、bwzgaiswj gak 10 gwz, cienq raemx gwn, yw ae、myaiz lai.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ②Gonoegnueg ndip habliengh, cimq haeuj ndaw cucingh bae 3 ngoenz, cat baihrog, yw codaeuz baenzbaez.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij Vah Youq Gaiq Cibsam Daengx Guek Yinzminz Daibyauj Daihhoih Baez Hoih Daih'it Gangj 2018 nienz 3 nyied 20 hauh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Baez daihhoih neix sienj gou laebdaeb dang Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz cujsiz, gak boux daibyauj caeuq daengx guek gak cuz yinzminz saenqnyaemh gou, gou caensim docih!

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dang Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz cujsiz aen cizvu hungsang neix, sawjmingh miznaj, cwzyin hungnaek. Gou yaek lumj doenghbaez ityiengh, lauxsaed hengzguh gij ciczwz Yenfaz gyauhawj, doiq guekcoj cungcig, doiq yinzminz cung-

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Sojmiz gunghcoz yinzyenz ndaw guekgya gihgvanh, mboujlwnh aen cizvei de geijlai sang, cungj itdingh aeu geiqmaenh aen gunghozgoz raeuz dwg Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz, itcig coq yinzminz youq ndawsim aen diegvih ceiq sang, itcig cienzsim cienzeiq vih yinzminz fuzvu, itcig vih gij leih'ik caeuq vuenyungz yinzminz haenqrengz bae guh hong.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yinzminz dwg boux dajcauh lizsij, yinzminz dwg boux yinghyungz caencingq. Aen lizsij Cunghvaz Minzcuz fazcanj singseiq hungdaih dwg yinzminz Cungguek raiz ok! Gij Cunghvaz vwnzmingz gvangqlangh laegna dwg yinzminz Cungguek dajcauh! Gij cingsaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz yungh nanz lij moq dwg yinzminz Cungguek gungganq! Cunghvaz Minzcuz ciep daeuj mbat yatbongh hungmbwk daj ndwn hwnjdaeuj, fouq hwnjdaeuj daengz ak hwnjdaeuj neix dwg yinzminz Cung-guek buekguh okdaeuj!

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yinzminz dwg boux dajcauh lizsij, yinzminz dwg boux yinghyungz caencingq. Aen lizsij Cunghvaz Minzcuz fazcanj singseiq hungdaih dwg yinzminz Cungguek raiz ok! Gij Cunghvaz vwnzmingz gvangqlangh laegna dwg yinzminz Cung-guek dajcauh! Gij cingsaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz yungh nanz lij moq dwg yinzminz Cungguek gungganq! Cunghvaz Minzcuz ciep daeuj mbat yatbongh hungmbwk daj ndwn hwnjdaeuj, fouq hwnjdaeuj daengz ak hwnjdaeuj neix dwg yinzminz Cung-guek buekguh okdaeuj!

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij binjcaet daegbied、dienfaenh gig ndei yinzminz Cungguek mboujdan couqbaenz le gij Cunghvaz vwnzmingz lienzdaemh geij cien bi fazcanj daengz seizneix, caemhcaiq laegdaeuq yingjyangj aen Cungguek ciuhneix fazcanj cinbu, laegdaeuq yingjyangj gij cingsaenz seiqgyaiq vunz Cungguek ciuhneix. Gij minzcuz cingsaenz hungmbwk yinzminz Cung-guek youq ndaw ciengzgeiz buekguh gungganq、ciepswnj、fazcanj hwnjdaeuj haenx, vih Cungguek fazcanj caeuq vunzloih

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ——Yinzminz Cungguek dwg gij yinzminz miz yieng cingsaenz dajcauh hungmbwk. Youq ndaw lizsij geij cien bi raezrangrang, yinzminz Cungguek itcig gaenxhong、fatmingz dajcauh, guek raeuz miz ok Laujswj、Gungjswj、Canghswj、Mungswj、Mwzswj、Sunhswj、Hanzfeihswj daengj doengh boux canghswhsiengj hungmbwk youq gwnz biengz mizmingz neix, fatmingz le cauhceij、ywsiu、yaenqsaw gisuz、ceijnamz-cim doengh gij gohgi cwngzgoj hungmbwk laegdaeuq yingj-yangj aen cincwngz vunzloih vwnzmingz neix, raiz ok gij vwnzyi cozbinj hungmbwk baudaengz Seiging、Cujswz、Han-fu、Dangzsei、Sungswz、Yenzgiz、sawcuenh Mingz Cingh daengj, cienzciep le Vuengz Gwzsazwj、Majnazswh、Gyangh-gwzwj daengj doengh gij fwensei lizsij hungmbwk saenqdoengh simvunz neix, hwnqguh le Fanh Leix Cangzcwngz、Duh-gyanghyen、Dayinhoz、Gugungh、Budazlahgungh daengj doengh aen gunghcwngz hungmbwk heiqseiq hungloet neix. Ngoenzneix, gij cingsaenz dajcauh yinzminz Cungguek cingq-caih yungh yiengh singseiq doenghbaez caengz miz gvaq de biuconh okdaeuj, doidoengh guek raeuz ngoenz ndei gvaq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: ——Yinzminz Cungguek dwg gij yinzminz miz yiengh cingsaenz buekguh hungmbwk. Youq ndaw lizsij geij cien bi raezrangrang, yinzminz Cungguek itcig gaij gaeuq cauhmoq, gag rox roengzrengz baenaj, haifat caeuq hwnqguh le aen guekcoj gyaeundei gvangqlangh raeuz, haivut le aen haijyangz gvangqyubyub yawj mbouj daengz giz caenh haenx, hai ok le baenz doengh baenz benq reihnaz hawj haeuxgwn rim cang, ceihleix le cien bak diuz dah hung luenh cung luenh dongj bonghbiu baenaj haenx, dwkhingz le gij swyenz caihaih geq mbouj rox liux, hwnqbaenz aen singz aen mbanj lai lumj ndaundeiq gwnzmbwn, fazcanj le gij canjnieb yienghyiengh caezcienz, cauhbaenz gij saedceij lai saek lai yiengh. Yinz-minz Cungguek daj ciuhgeq couh mingzbeg, lajmbwn mbouj miz gij saehndei naengh youq gwnndwi, siengj vuenyungz couh aeu buekguh. Ngoenzneix, sojmiz gij doxgaiq yinzminz Cungguek yiengjsouh neix, yienghyiengh cungj gietcomz miz gij dungxcaiz coengmingz vunz Cungguek, cimqdumz gij raemxhanh sinhoj gaenxguh vunz Cungguek, yocangz haujlai

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: daeuj, youq yiengh hingzseiq haenqrem bingcaeg daj rog guek gunghoenx haeujdaeuj, guek raeuz gak cuz yinzminz fwngz daz fwngz, mbaq daemj mbaq, daihdamj haenqguh, buek-mingh buekhoenx, dwkbaih le sojmiz gij bingcaeg yakrwix rog guek, henhoh le minzcuz doglaeb caeuq swyouz, doengzcaez sijbaenz bien sawfaenz hungmbwk Cunghvaz Minzcuz henhoh guekcoj, dingjhoenx guekrog hangzhaep. Ngoenzneix, Cung-guek aeundaej doengh gij fazcanj cwingzciu hawj vunz lajmbwn cimyawj, gij neix engq dwg daengx guek gak cuz yinzminz doengz sim doengz daek, caezsim roengzrengz cij aeu ndaej. Yinzminz Cungguek daj caenndang ginglig laegdaeuq rox daengz, doxgiet couh dwg rengzlig, doxgiet cijndaej baenaj, aen guekgya siksinz sanqdanh ndeu mbouj gojnaengz fazcanj cinbu. Gou saenq, cijaeu 13 ik lai yinzminz Cungguek ciengxlwenx fazyangz yiengh cingsaenz doxgiet hungmbwk neix, raeuz couh itdingh ndaej cauxbaenz cungj rengzlig hung'ak itcig roemx baenaj, gijmaz cungj dingjdangj mbouj ndaej haenx. ——Yinzminz Cungguek dwg gij yinzminz miz yiengh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bonj saw neix souhaeuj gij cucoz youqgaenj Dwng Siujbingz dungzci youq 1982 nienz 9 nyied daengz 1992 nienz 2 nyied duenh seizgan neix sij haenx, bienbaenz « Dwng Siujbingz Vwnzsenj» daihsam gienj. Song bonj vwnzsenj gaenq okbanj haenx, youq baezlaeng ok banj daihngeih seiz yaek faenbied gaij heuhguh « Dwng Siujbingz Vwnzsenj» daih'it gienj, daihngeih gienj.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Vwnzsenj daihsam gienj gungh miz gangjvah, damzvah daengj 119 bien. Daih dingzlai dwg daih 'it baez goenghai fatbiuj. Gij cucoz gaenq youq ndaw《Gensez Yiengh Seveicujyi Miz Cungguek Daegsaek》 bonj debouj caeuq gaijcingq .《Dwng Siujbingz Dungzci Cungyau Damzvah 1987 nienz 2 nyied——7 nyied 》daengj ceksaw iq haenx caeuq gwnz bauceij fatbiuj gvaq haenx, baez neix bien haeuj vwnzsenj seiz, youh cingjleix gvaq sawcih, haujlai bien gaengawq giluzgauj dembouj le cungyau neiyungz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bonj vwnzsenj neix dawz bonj vwnzsenj gonq 1975—1982 bien faenzcieng ceiqsat « Cunghgoz Gung-canjdangj Daih Cib Ngeih Baez Daengx Guek Daibyauj Daihhoih Gaihmuswz» senj daeuj guh bien haidaeuz, aeu 1992 nienz 1 nyied 18 hauh daengz 21 hauh « Youq Vujcangh, Sinhcin, Cuhhaij, Sanghaij Dwngj Dieg Damzvah Ndawde Gij Yaudenj Haenx» guh bien gietsat.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq mwh benhciz bonj saw neix, bouxsij cug bien saemjdingh le cienzbouh vwnzgauj.

text: Ok rog baenz maz vunz, Guh vanz mij lumj fwx.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Doenghbaez, Mbanjcuengh, miz boux, lwggyax ndeu, dwg dah sau youh roxsog youh gyaeundei ndeu, con de heuhguh Dahlingz. Aenvih ranz Dahlingz reihnaz mbouj dingh, ndigah de couh bae henz rij ndaem gorangz. De sim'ung simsoh, raen miuzraangz deng non haeb, couh aeu raemxhaeux rwed de, raen gorangz deng fwn hung dub, couh aeu mhan gyoij daeuj goemg de dwk.

text: Mwh gong, miz vanz vunz ndeu qyoug ndaw. ndoeng, ranz faenz miz song lwg, beix mbwk gouj bi, huengx sai roek bi.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Cieng Mingz: Qyoug ndei gwn van! Gijdaenj duh bouxcuengh miz meh rawz la? Daeg Fek: Qyoug ndei gun van! miz buh、vag、haiz、mad、mauh、boeg、caeug vinj. Cieng Mingz: Ig naeuz buh miz dingz rawz lai? Daeg Fek: miz buh gen dinj、buh ndaw、buh raez、buh beu、buh dungh、buh rog、 buh cap aek

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bih noengx dwngz lai, dwngz lai ndae, vaenz naeh zawh bi soeng teng linz ngih sip aet, gungx lih ndaen ziat vaenz sip gaeuj hauq, cinx qix yih, nungh lih ndaen qoek qo sip, baez naeh daj dwngz lai lemh le vih baih dawj naeh:

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gaxgonq, gou itcig laihnaeuz geu buhmhangjmbaek Bwzguyauz cij miz cungj doz ndeu, Ahgungh lwnh gou nyi le gou cij rox, doz geu buhmhangjmbaek Bwzguyauz ceiqnoix miz haj roek cungj bienqvaq. Cij mbouj gvaq youq ndaw doz mbouj doengz, hamz miz gij neiyungzdaihgaiq doxdoengz, cungj aeu cihsaw " " caeuug dozgoek doznye guh haenz, ndaw doz cihsaw " " go' gyaj mwnhoengh, haenznaz lai, baihrog naz lwgnyez caeuq gaeqlwg baizlied caezcingj. Gou dauq roxnyinh, gij doz caeuq yenzsu geu buhmhangjmbaek neix, engq lumj dwg youh yienh' ok gij saedceij hingzciengz vunzmbanj nei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij ieng Ahgungh yungh daeuj guh doz haenx gig saenzgeiz, dwg aeu gij ieng faexgau guhhaenz. Faexgau dwg cungj faex dig Bwzguyauz gag miz ndeu. Miz bi ndeu seizein, dou bae ranz Ahgungh, youq gwnz roen bungzdaengz gyagoeng ranz de, de heuhguh Aumingz, roekib lai bi. Aumingz dwg bouxvunz Bwzguyauz ceiq miz daegsaek haujmaemh cienzdoengj sihgvenq haenx. De yungh diuz haengz hau hwz gij hyemgyaeuj dingz hau dingz ndaem haenx youq dingj gyaeuj, de daenj geu vaq raz daengz gyaeujhoq caeuq haihrg daenj buh ndaem. Aumingz cingq dawz mbaeklae faex gaq daengz gwnz go faexgau, youq gwnz mbaeklae, fwngzwix gaem fagsiuq, fwngzgvaz gaem fageuiz, youq gwnz go faexgau hung ndeu siuq congh. Gwnz go faexgau haenx miz congh geq caengz nem caengz, youq demlai haujlai congh moq. Gij congh haenx baizlied caezcingj, lumj dwg comz youq ciengq go nei, youq gyang gemh riengz rumz ciengq go. Faexgau congh yied lai, go faex couh yied maengh. Daj gyae yawj, daengz go faexgau lumj aen bingzva henjmong haekm ziye faex ndeu, gwnz go faex gij mhaw heuswd haenx lumj ndok hya nei haizlied caezcingj, youq aen lajmhwn lamz riengz rumz hibuengq, deih caex miz gvilwd, seizgan lumjhaenz couh menh roengzdaeuj nei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou mbouj rox couh cam Aumingz, siuq gij congh haenx guhmaz? Aumingz naeuz dwg vihluxr aeu ienggau. Seizein siuq congh, seizahah couh miz ieng daj ndaw congh lae okdaeuj, seizhaenx couh baenz gwaqdaeuj aeu ienggau lo. Aumingz vix giz mbouj gyae go faexgau hung lumj gen fwngz ndeu naeuz, sou yawj, yienzhonj faexgau cungj maj haenz yienghhaenx, caeuq faex wng mbouj miz maz mbouj doengz, dou binaengz cungj siuq congh, hawj raemxieng de lae okdaeuj, menhmenh nei de couh hienq hung bienq ndeiyawj lo. Yienzlaiz dwg yienghneix, gou cungj laihnaeuz faexgau yienzhonj couh maengh haenzhaenx, seizneix cij rox, yienzlaiz dwg gingqvaq yungh vunz bae guh yienghhaenx cij hienqndaej baenzneix geizheih.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Raen Ahgungh, gou naeuz, Aumingz caen ndei, lij vih mngz siuq faex aeu ienggau ne. Ahgungh riu naeuz, neix dwg gij sihgvenq Bwzguyauz dou, aeu bouxsai nienzlaux bae siuq congh faex, mehmbwk nienzlaux bae aeu ienggau. Gou cam Ahgungh, gwnz faex ndaej lae ok haujlai ieng lwi? Ahgungh naeuz mbouj lai, go faexgau ndeu ceiq lai rom ndaej gaen ieng ndeu hwnjroengz. Ahgungh lij naeuz, gij ienggau haenx aeu dauq liux le, yaek aeu raemx daeuh nya nu bae nu dauq, swiq gij doxgaiq cab ienggau bae, daengz de hienqhaenz hausak le cij ndaej yungh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou rox, guh ndangdaenj Yauzeuz gig fukeah, bouhloh lai youh nyoengq. Siuq congh, aeu ieng, guh doz cij dwg ndawde gij bouhloh iq ndeu. Ndangdaenj bouxsai yungzheih di, aeu saek ndaem saek hau guh goek, hoeng ndangdaenj mehmbwk saek raizva haenx couh fukeah lai lo, guh dauq ndeu ca mbouj lai guh bae hi seizgan ndeu.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Youq Lijhuz Yauzcz Yangh, ciengziengz yawjraen mhangj mehmbwk Bwzguyauz sam boux haj houx haenz gyoengq youq ndaw ndoeng, gwnz doenghnaz dwk dongh guh haengz, rag sa, roi sa, sou sa, hwh daemj baengz. Hix ciengz yawjraen mehmbwk Bwzguyauz naengh youq gwnz mhaek dou ranz swhgeij, yungh ienggau niu guh doz ndangdaenj caeuq siuq va, guh hoiqgienh buh. Roxnyinh gyoengqde seizseiz cungj nyaengq dangqmaz, mbouj dwg guh hong reihnaz couh dwg guh ndangdaenj, gyoengqde cungj mbouj ndaej youq hoengq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Dinfwngz Ahgungh ndei dangqmaz, guh dandgaenj Yauzeuz ndei raixcaix, gou naeuz de haenz guh lai di, cawz ranz swhgeij daenj, hix ndaej dawz hae gai. Ahgungh naeuz caj gai mou caeuq cwz liux, hix dajsuenq hae dig anceiq youq. Bouxgvan de Ahginh hix haenz youq gingjigh roxnaeuz dieg henzgyawj ra saeh guh, Ahgungh hix ndaej gyahaeuj Aen Fangj Nyumx Baengz Liz Fungeinh ndaw segih guh dandgaenj Yauzeuz, roxnaeuz gyahaeuj guh feihiyz vwnzva haijyienj. Liz Fungeinh dwg sweigih gaep boux cienzswnj feihiyz dandgaenj Yauzeuz miz daihyaujsing haenx, youq Dojnuj Segih daiqlingx bak lai boux mehmbwk Bwzguyauz guh ndangdaenj Yauzeuz gai, hawj gyoengq mehmbwk Bwzguyauz dieg anceiqmiz hong guh. Ahgungh siengj, riengz gij lijyouz canjnieh hwngvuengh hwnjdaeuj, cungj ndaej youq dieg anceiq youq maenh doek rag. Mhangjhoux youq ndaw Dojnuj Segih haenx gaenq youq ranz swhgeij hai bouqgaihuq, hoh nden ranz Ahgungh lij hai le aen bouq sauhgauj ndeu, gyoenggvunz cungj gaenxmaenx yungzhaeuj cungj saedceij moq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenzlwenz ngamq cuengqhag ma daengz ranz,daeglwg gou couh heuh gou bae swiq byaek cawj byaek,de caeuq boh de gaj geij buenz geiz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou mbouj sij ndaej bae guh hong,couh naengh roengzdaeuj guh bouxbuenq.Baez yaep da,gvan gou couh lienz saw seiq buenz,lienz de cihgeij dwg baenzlawz yiengh deng saw,de hix loengh mbouj cingcuj.Gvan gou gangj:"Ya,dauq deng saw hawj boux lwgnyez sam haet,sim mbouj fug bw!Gou couh mbouj saenq,de ak ndaej gvaq gou."Cij raen gvan gou gip ndei geizhau de,haeujsim sisi cimyawj buenzgeiz,boux lwg moix cuengq aen geiz,de cungj naemj aen geiz youq neix miz ma moegdik,gauj ma yaemmaeuz. Hoeng,daeglwg mbouj lwq de baenzlai,doengh ndaej gig vaiq,mwngz cuengq aen geiz,de hix ciep dwk cuengq aen geiz,lumj dwg mbouj miz ma naemjfap,cij dwg luenh doengh.Couh dwg yienghneix,daeglwg hingz ndaej soengsuemqsuemq,angq dwk riugakgak.Gvan gou saw ndaej naj nyouqyaujyauj,haeb bak haeb heuj sim mbouj fug.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gou couh mbouj saenq daeglwg gou ndaej yienghneix ak,dawz byaek swiq seuq,couh byoengz gvan gou bae cawj byaek,hawj gou daeuj doiqfouq de.Gou wnggai beij gvan gou coengmingz di ba?Buenz daih'it,gou mbouj cuengq ndaej geij aen geiz,couh sou hong lo,saw ndaej beij gvan gou engq camj.Ciep roengzdaeuj geij

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Hagdangz dwk daemz,youh ndaej faen bya lo,ndaw sim gou miz di angq,youh miz di damsim.Angq dwg aenvih youh ndaej gwn bya saensien lo,damsim dwg aenvih gou fwgzheiq mbouj gaeuq,mbat mbat cungj nyaep ndaej geij lwg bya'iq,mbat mbat cungj da yawj boux wnq angqvauvau dwk riuj duz byahung he riugokgok ma ranz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Ngoenz neix,daengngoenz daj baih sae okdaeuj lo.Cij raen gij bya baizlehleh youq gwnz dieg,cingq caj bouxcawj aeu gyoengqde ma ranz cawj ne.Seizneix gaenq miz geij boux lauxsae nyaep ciem lo,gou seizbienh nyaep song naed ciem,cek hai baez yawj,caen dwg lumj gip ndaej cienz yienghneix angq,mienh diuq mienh dawz mbaw ciem nem hwnj ndangbya byavanz hung bae,gou caiq cek yawj lingj mbaw ciem,hix dwg duz byalienz hung ndeu,gou riu ndaej bak cungj hup mbouj hwnjdaeuj lo.Hoeng,gou lij caengz angq ndaej sam faen cung,Veiz lauxsae fatyienh,bya faen ndaej faenhsoq mbouj gaeuq,itgungh 16 boux vunz,ngamq faen miz 14 faenh lo,yienghneix youh deng faen gvaq lo,youh deng nyaep gvaq ciem lo,gou begbeg angq lo.Bouxlawz rox caij yaep he vanzlij nyaep ndaej mbouj ndaej byahung lo.Haicij nyaep ciem lo,gou hawj gyoengq lauxsae sien nyaep,sim naemj:Doxgaiq ndei caem roengz daej,gangj mbouj dingh youh ..Gou youh genj song aen ciem,cek hai daih'it aen,ndaw sim mbouj siengj daengz nyaep ndaej byahung,couh menhmenh bae ra

text: Poujzungh zeyh aen minfzuf mayh yuengh slei maz gangjbak ndeu, taeng ziuhges daux geyx de zeengh mayh yuengh slei maz laemh zionx vax gangj hoj, byaemh zaoh ok aen veenfhvaq nyaemzslei okmeengz daengz sleisgyais ndeu. Vamz "Beihnongx" deenx ious gangj Toj, Iuij, Dayzliox vax Dayznio guck rauz vaxdaengz gangj Dayz-Noengz gyang Miongzgeu, Dayznoyj gyang Miongzdayz, Dayznyoys gyang Miongzlaox, Dayznio gyang Myanmar, Ahom gyang Indo zus zeyh dos aen iqslwl ndeu, bao meiz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Mboy tomgol deenx ious sleizgeyx okyangz, zeyh veihleux yaxok aen zeengz poens beihnongx Poujzungh rauz gyoyhnai slam ginh slayh lung bei 2008 deenx: Voih Olimpik Baekgeeng, Bei Gangjmeh Sleisgyais 2008, Miongz Gaggaem Poujzungh Gungjslay laebbaenz 50 kupbei.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Poujzungh meiz 1700 lai fanh goenz, aen tomgol deenx zeyh yuengh gangj Noengz-lang Toj Deefbaov-Zeengqslil gyang Gangjzungh Faihdoyj maz cangq, aen gangj deihfung deenx gayh maz meiz 160 lai fanh goenz, zenq slosgoenz Gangjzungh meiz 1/10 raemhreh. Ious gyang Gangjzungh mbengjndoy nir, gangj Toj Deef-Zeengq zeyh aen gangj deihfung vaxdaengz gangj Noengz, Dayz, Laox, San guknog duenghkyoyj haetdauz ndeu, zeyh aen ylovyenf kamjguk gyaenjius gahraix ndeu.

Laujveiz byaij gvaqbae, Laujcinz lij miz dimbouj gamj naj doiq Laujveiz. Hoeng Laujveiz cawjdoengh iet fwngz gvaqbae, naeuz: "Dauqma cix ndei, riengz gou daj haidaeuz guh!" Laujcinz ngawh youq gizhaenx, ngeix yaep ndeu le, hix iet fwgz gvaqdaeuj gaem fwgz Laujveiz, naeuz: "Baenz, riengz mwngz daj haidaeuz guh!"

text: Dingq Mehcinz baenzneix gangj, Laujveiz couh nyapnyuk lo. Danghnaeuz hawj Laujcinz geij fanh maenz ngaenz, Laujcinz couh mbouj bae guh gij saeh doxdax vaiz doxhoenx haenx, de da cungj mbouj yaep doq mbon ngaenzbau, hoeng duenhdingh Laujcinz guh mbouj baenz saeh lij luenh hawj ngaenz, yienghneix guh mbouj dwg dangq haih vunz haih bonjfaenh ma? Mbouj guenj youxdoih gangj geijlai vah'ienq, de cungj cang rwznuk nyaenxhoz nyaenxheiq youq.

text: Youq Lingjnamz, Cojgoeng Bouxcuengh dwg boux ceiq caeux hai benq dieg neix. script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Zhuang ancestors were the earliest settlers of south China. It was a glorious history of Zhuang's independent development from ancient time to early Qin dynasty. It was believed that Zhuang ancestors were the first ones to developed rice cultivating, pottery making and animals domesticating. They also mastered bronze smelting technique and used it to manufacture bronze drums which were symbol of authority. Drawn by Zhuang ancestors, huge cliff paintings along the Zuojiang river is still a beautiful and wonderful mystery today. In the cultural and ideological field, Zhuang formed the "mo" religion as the core of the primitive religious culture and simple philosophy. About 214bc, Qin dynasty pacified south China, so that Zhuang ancestors became subjects of Qin Emperor. Qin dynasty successively introduced national policies into Zhuang region to deepen and strengthen the ruling. Qin dynasty's domination had a profound impact on the development of zhuang culture.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 10 nyied 26 daengz 29 hauh, aenhoih Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj Daihcibgouj Gaiq Cunghyangh Veij-yenzvei Daihhaj Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi youq Baekging hai. Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei cungjsuhgi Siz Ginbingz gangj gij vah youqgaenj. Daengxcungq vunz hai aenhoih neix caez dingq caeuq doxyaeng gij baugau youz Cunghyangh Cwngci Giz hawj Siz Ginbingz guh de. Cunghyangh Cwngci Giz guhdaeuz ndabaiz baez hoih neix

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daengxcungq vunz hai aenhoih neix haeujsim saemjlwnh caemhcaiq docnggvaq le 《Aen Genyi Cunghgung Cunghyangh Dingh Gij Vehsuenq

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daihcibseiq Aen Haj Bi Caeuq Gij Vehsuenq Gyae Daengz Bi 2035 Gvendaengz Hwngfat Gozminz Ginghei Caeuq Aenbiengz》

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daengxcungq vunz hai aenhoih neix hemqheuh, daengx aendangj daengx guek gak cuz lwgminz yaek doxgiet maenhndaet youq senqhenz aen dangjcunghyangh aeu Siz Gin-bingz guh cehsim de, caezhoz caemh-sim, haenqrengz buekguh, dwkhingz ciengz ciengq hwnqguh aen guek sevei cujyi yienghyieng cungj guh-daengz yendaiva caez bae.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daengxcungq vunz hai aenhoih neix caemh baenzneix nyinhnaeuz, bungzdaengz seiqgyaiq gak guek dox-

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Yungzsuij: Cienz Gij Cingsaenz "Haj Cung Cienzhoih" Haeuj Mbanjyauz

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 10 nyied 31 hauhi,Yungzsiuj Myauzcz Sw-ciyen Gijveij Genhveij gyoebbaenz aendoih senhconz iq, bae daengz ndaw yienh Dungzlen Yauzcuz Yangh, fat swh-liu、dangcieng gangj、aeu banjbau langhbaj daengj, baenzneix guh lwnh vunzlai rox Cungh-goz Gungcanjdangj Daih-cibgouj Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijenzvei Daihhaj Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi ok maz cwncgwz moq、yienghsiengq moq、hong-baenz moq caeuq gij vehsuenq "cibseiq haj" caeuq gij vehsuenq gyae daengz bi 2035, vunzlai maij dingq gyaez aeu rox. Ndaw doz dwg boux gijgenj genhcaz ganbu Liengz Yin' gvei lwnh gij cingsaenz "Haj Cung Cienzhoih" hawj gyoengq beixnuengx Yauzcuz rox. Lungz Linzci

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Sawcuengh miz bet aen singdiuh, ndaw de miz roek aen diuhsingdoeng, song aen diuhsing-saek. Moix aen yinhmehdoeng cungj miz roek aen yaem sang daemq mbouj doengz. Yaem sang lumj cih "na" , couh dwg daih'it diuh

Bonjsawneix couh dwg《Sawcuengh Gyangjco》 bonj daih'it, hawj boux dingq gvangjbo doiqciuq hag. Aenvih dou sawcuengh suijbingz mbouj sang gizlawz ca caeuq mbouj deng, muengh caezgya daez yigen.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Nanzningz Si Sawcuengh Sevei Sawjyungh Guenjleix Banhfap

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Daih 1 diuz Vih doidoengh Sawcuengh youq sevei sawjyungh ndawde guh gveihfanva, byauhcunjva,g aengawq 《Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz Minzcuz Gihyiz Swcifaz》、《Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gungho zgoz Aen Fap Vahsaw Guekgya Doengyungh》, giethab gij saedceiq aen si neix,ceiqdingh aen banhfap neix. Daih 2 diuz Ndaw si hingzcwng gihyiz gij sevei sawjyungh, guenjleix habyungh aen banhfap neix.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gij sevei sawjyungh aen banhfap neix gangj,dwg ceij dawz Sawcuengh yiengq sevei cungqvunz sawjy ungh. Daih 3 diuzSi, yienh gih minzcuz swvu hingzcwg cawjguenj bumwnz,fucwz guenjleix bonj yaz gih Sawjyungh sevei sawjyungh guenjleix gunghcoz.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Aen gihgou hong siujsoq minzcuz fucwz guenjleix gij hong ngoenznaengz yungh youq ndaw dieg bonjf aenh Sawcuengh sevei sawjyungh.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Gungh'anh, minzcwng, gyaudoeng daengj bouhmonz youq ndaw cizcwz fanveiz bonjfaenh doiq gij ci ngzgvang sawjyungh ndawbiengz Sawcuengh guh genjczaz, gamduk. Diuz daihseiq Najyiengq sevei s awjyungh Sawcuengh,wngdang byauhcunj, gveihfan,sawcih caeczingj, cingcuj. Vih gangjok doengz a en neiyungz ndeu cix doengzseiz sawjyungh Sawcuengh, Sawgun miz song cungj cihsaw,gij hamzeiq Sawcuengh wngdang caeuq Sawgun doxdoengz. Daih 5 diuz Gujli giyez, sevei cujciz caeuq goyinz,yo uq sevei yungh saw ndawde doengzseiz sawjyungh Sawcuengh, Sawgun song cungj cihsaw. Daih 6 diuz Gij cih sevei yungh cihsaw lajneix,wngdang doengzseiz yungh Sawcuengh, Sawgun song cungj ci hsaw:

text: 2 Guekgya gihgvanh, swyez danhvei baizbenj caeuq gunghcangh

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 3 Gij mingzcoh si、yen gih cwngfuj cwngvu vangjcan、cwngbau

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: 4 gihcangz, hojcehcan, gicehcan, sokruz, bozvuzgvanj, canjlanjgvanj, duzsuhgvanj, dijyzgvanj
